(** Displayed monoidal categories

Author: Benedikt Ahrens 2021

 *)

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.PartD.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.catiso.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecategoryBinProduct.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.AlternativeDefinitions.MonoidalCategoriesTensored.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.AlternativeDefinitions.MonoidalFunctorsTensored.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Total.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Constructions.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope mor_disp_scope.
Local Notation "C ⊠ C'" := (category_binproduct C C').

Section DispCartProdOfCats.

  Context {C C' : category}
          (D : disp_cat C)
          (D' : disp_cat C').

  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
disp_cat_ob_mor (C ⊠ C')

  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
disp_cat_ob_mor (C ⊠ C')

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
C ⊠ C' → UU
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
(λ obd : C ⊠ C' → UU,
 ∏ x y : C ⊠ C', obd x → obd y → C ⊠ C' ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU)
  ?pr1

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
C ⊠ C' → UU
 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
cc': C ⊠ C'
UU
 exact (D (pr1 cc') × D' (pr2 cc')).
    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
(λ obd : C ⊠ C' → UU,
 ∏ x y : C ⊠ C', obd x → obd y → C ⊠ C' ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU)
  (λ cc' : C ⊠ C', D (pr1 cc') × D' (pr2 cc'))
 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
aa', bb': C ⊠ C'
xx': D (pr1 aa') × D' (pr2 aa')
yy': D (pr1 bb') × D' (pr2 bb')
fg: C ⊠ C' ⟦ aa', bb' ⟧
UU

      exact ( (pr1 xx' -->[ pr1 fg ] pr1 yy') × (pr2 xx' -->[ pr2 fg ] pr2 yy' )).
  Defined.

  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
disp_cat_id_comp (C ⊠ C') disp_binprod_ob_mor

  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
disp_cat_id_comp (C ⊠ C') disp_binprod_ob_mor

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
∏ (x : C ⊠ C') (xx : disp_binprod_ob_mor x),
xx -->[ id x] xx
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
(λ _ : ∏ (x : C ⊠ C') (xx : disp_binprod_ob_mor x),
       xx -->[ id x] xx,
 ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C') (f : C ⊠ C' ⟦ x, y ⟧)
 (g : C ⊠ C' ⟦ y, z ⟧) (xx : disp_binprod_ob_mor x)
 (yy : disp_binprod_ob_mor y)
 (zz : disp_binprod_ob_mor z),
 xx -->[ f] yy → yy -->[ g] zz → xx -->[ f · g] zz)
  ?pr1

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
∏ (x : C ⊠ C') (xx : disp_binprod_ob_mor x),
xx -->[ id x] xx
 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
x: C ⊠ C'
xx: disp_binprod_ob_mor x
xx -->[ id x] xx

      
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
x: C ⊠ C'
xx: disp_binprod_ob_mor x
pr1 xx -->[ pr1 (id x)] pr1 xx
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
x: C ⊠ C'
xx: disp_binprod_ob_mor x
pr2 xx -->[ pr2 (id x)] pr2 xx

      
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
x: C ⊠ C'
xx: disp_binprod_ob_mor x
pr1 xx -->[ pr1 (id x)] pr1 xx
 apply id_disp.
      
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
x: C ⊠ C'
xx: disp_binprod_ob_mor x
pr2 xx -->[ pr2 (id x)] pr2 xx
 apply id_disp.
    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
(λ _ : ∏ (x : C ⊠ C') (xx : disp_binprod_ob_mor x),
       xx -->[ id x] xx,
 ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C') (f : C ⊠ C' ⟦ x, y ⟧)
 (g : C ⊠ C' ⟦ y, z ⟧) (xx : disp_binprod_ob_mor x)
 (yy : disp_binprod_ob_mor y)
 (zz : disp_binprod_ob_mor z),
 xx -->[ f] yy → yy -->[ g] zz → xx -->[ f · g] zz)
  (λ (x : C ⊠ C') (xx : disp_binprod_ob_mor x),
   make_dirprod (id_disp (pr1 xx)) (id_disp (pr2 xx)))
 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
aa', bb', cc': C ⊠ C'
ff': C ⊠ C' ⟦ aa', bb' ⟧
gg': C ⊠ C' ⟦ bb', cc' ⟧
xx': disp_binprod_ob_mor aa'
yy': disp_binprod_ob_mor bb'
zz': disp_binprod_ob_mor cc'
hh': xx' -->[ ff'] yy'
ii': yy' -->[ gg'] zz'
xx' -->[ ff' · gg'] zz'

      
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
aa', bb', cc': C ⊠ C'
ff': C ⊠ C' ⟦ aa', bb' ⟧
gg': C ⊠ C' ⟦ bb', cc' ⟧
xx': disp_binprod_ob_mor aa'
yy': disp_binprod_ob_mor bb'
zz': disp_binprod_ob_mor cc'
hh': xx' -->[ ff'] yy'
ii': yy' -->[ gg'] zz'
pr1 xx' -->[ pr1 (ff' · gg')] pr1 zz'
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
aa', bb', cc': C ⊠ C'
ff': C ⊠ C' ⟦ aa', bb' ⟧
gg': C ⊠ C' ⟦ bb', cc' ⟧
xx': disp_binprod_ob_mor aa'
yy': disp_binprod_ob_mor bb'
zz': disp_binprod_ob_mor cc'
hh': xx' -->[ ff'] yy'
ii': yy' -->[ gg'] zz'
pr2 xx' -->[ pr2 (ff' · gg')] pr2 zz'

      
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
aa', bb', cc': C ⊠ C'
ff': C ⊠ C' ⟦ aa', bb' ⟧
gg': C ⊠ C' ⟦ bb', cc' ⟧
xx': disp_binprod_ob_mor aa'
yy': disp_binprod_ob_mor bb'
zz': disp_binprod_ob_mor cc'
hh': xx' -->[ ff'] yy'
ii': yy' -->[ gg'] zz'
pr1 xx' -->[ pr1 (ff' · gg')] pr1 zz'
 apply (comp_disp (pr1 hh') (pr1 ii')).
      
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
aa', bb', cc': C ⊠ C'
ff': C ⊠ C' ⟦ aa', bb' ⟧
gg': C ⊠ C' ⟦ bb', cc' ⟧
xx': disp_binprod_ob_mor aa'
yy': disp_binprod_ob_mor bb'
zz': disp_binprod_ob_mor cc'
hh': xx' -->[ ff'] yy'
ii': yy' -->[ gg'] zz'
pr2 xx' -->[ pr2 (ff' · gg')] pr2 zz'
 apply (comp_disp (pr2 hh') (pr2 ii')).
  Defined.


  Definition disp_binprod_data : disp_cat_data (C ⊠ C')
    := disp_binprod_ob_mor ,,  disp_binprod_id_comp.


  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
a', b': C'
f', g': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
x': D' a'
y': D' b'
ff: x -->[ f] y
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
e: (f #, f') = (g #, g')
transportf (mor_disp x y) (maponpaths pr1 e) ff =
pr1
  (transportf (mor_disp (x,, x') (y,, y')) e
     (ff,, ff'))

  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
a', b': C'
f', g': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
x': D' a'
y': D' b'
ff: x -->[ f] y
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
e: (f #, f') = (g #, g')
transportf (mor_disp x y) (maponpaths pr1 e) ff =
pr1
  (transportf (mor_disp (x,, x') (y,, y')) e
     (ff,, ff'))

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
a', b': C'
f', g': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
x': D' a'
y': D' b'
ff: x -->[ f] y
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
transportf (mor_disp x y)
  (maponpaths pr1 (idpath (f #, f'))) ff =
pr1
  (transportf (mor_disp (x,, x') (y,, y'))
     (idpath (f #, f')) (ff,, ff'))

    apply idpath.
  Qed.


  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
a', b': C'
f', g': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
x': D' a'
y': D' b'
ff: x -->[ f] y
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
e: (f #, f') = (g #, g')
transportf (mor_disp x' y') (maponpaths dirprod_pr2 e)
  ff' =
pr2
  (transportf (mor_disp (x,, x') (y,, y')) e
     (ff,, ff'))

  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
a', b': C'
f', g': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
x': D' a'
y': D' b'
ff: x -->[ f] y
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
e: (f #, f') = (g #, g')
transportf (mor_disp x' y') (maponpaths dirprod_pr2 e)
  ff' =
pr2
  (transportf (mor_disp (x,, x') (y,, y')) e
     (ff,, ff'))

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
a', b': C'
f', g': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
x': D' a'
y': D' b'
ff: x -->[ f] y
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
transportf (mor_disp x' y')
  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2 (idpath (f #, f'))) ff' =
pr2
  (transportf (mor_disp (x,, x') (y,, y'))
     (idpath (f #, f')) (ff,, ff'))

    apply idpath.
  Qed.


  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
disp_cat_axioms (C ⊠ C') disp_binprod_data

  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
disp_cat_axioms (C ⊠ C') disp_binprod_data

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
∏ (x y : C ⊠ C') (f : C ⊠ C' ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(xx : disp_binprod_data x)
(yy : pr1 disp_binprod_data y) (ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
id_disp xx ;; ff =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_left f) ff
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
∏ (x y : C ⊠ C') (f : C ⊠ C' ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(xx : disp_binprod_data x)
(yy : pr1 disp_binprod_data y) (ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
ff ;; id_disp yy =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_right f) ff
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
∏ (x y z w : C ⊠ C') (f : C ⊠ C' ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C ⊠ C' ⟦ y, z ⟧) (h : C ⊠ C' ⟦ z, w ⟧)
(xx : disp_binprod_data x) (yy : disp_binprod_data y)
(zz : disp_binprod_data z) (ww : disp_binprod_data w)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz)
(hh : zz -->[ h] ww),
ff ;; (gg ;; hh) =
transportb (mor_disp xx ww) (assoc f g h)
  (ff ;; gg ;; hh)
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
∏ (x y : C ⊠ C') (f : C ⊠ C' ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(xx : disp_binprod_data x) (yy : disp_binprod_data y),
isaset (xx -->[ f] yy)

    
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
∏ (x y : C ⊠ C') (f : C ⊠ C' ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(xx : disp_binprod_data x)
(yy : pr1 disp_binprod_data y) (ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
id_disp xx ;; ff =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_left f) ff
 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
a: C
a': C'
b: C
b': C'
f: C ⟦ pr1 (a,, a'), pr1 (b,, b') ⟧
f': C' ⟦ pr2 (a,, a'), pr2 (b,, b') ⟧
x: D (pr1 (a,, a'))
x': D' (pr2 (a,, a'))
y: D (pr1 (b,, b'))
y': D' (pr2 (b,, b'))
ff: pr1 (x,, x') -->[ pr1 (f,, f')] pr1 (y,, y')
ff': pr2 (x,, x') -->[ pr2 (f,, f')] pr2 (y,, y')
id_disp (x,, x') ;; (ff,, ff') =
transportb (mor_disp (x,, x') (y,, y'))
  (id_left (f,, f')) (ff,, ff')

D: disp_cat C

a: C

f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x: D a
x': D' a'
y: D b
y': D' b'
ff: x -->[ f] y
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
id_disp (x,, x') ;; (ff,, ff') =
transportb (mor_disp (x,, x') (y,, y'))
  (id_left (f,, f')) (ff,, ff')

ff: x -->[ f] y
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
pr1 (id_disp (x,, x') ;; (ff,, ff')) =
pr1
  (transportb (mor_disp (x,, x') (y,, y'))
     (id_left (f,, f')) (ff,, ff'))

D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'

id_disp x ;; ff = ?b
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
a: C

ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
?b =

     (id_left (f,, f')) (ff,, ff'))

D: disp_cat C

ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
transportb (mor_disp x y) (id_left f) ff =
pr1
  (transportb (mor_disp (x,, x') (y,, y'))
     (id_left (f,, f')) (ff,, ff'))

        
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
a: C
a': C'

b': C'
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x: D a
x': D' a'
y: D b
y': D' b'
ff: x -->[ f] y
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
transportb (mor_disp x y) (id_left f) ff = ?b
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
a: C
a': C'
b: C
b': C'
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧

x': D' a'
y: D b
y': D' b'
ff: x -->[ f] y

?b =

  (transportb (mor_disp (x,, x') (y,, y'))

C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
a: C
a': C'
b: C
b': C'
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x: D a
x': D' a'
y: D b
y': D' b'
ff: x -->[ f] y
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
?b =
pr1
  (transportb (mor_disp (x,, x') (y,, y'))
     (id_left (f,, f')) (ff,, ff'))
 apply disp_binprod_transportf_pr1. 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
a: C
a': C'
b: C
b': C'
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x: D a
x': D' a'
y: D b
y': D' b'
ff: x -->[ f] y
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
transportb (mor_disp x y) (id_left f) ff =
transportf (mor_disp x y)
  (maponpaths pr1 (! id_left (f,, f'))) ff

        
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
a: C
a': C'
b: C
b': C'
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x: D a
x': D' a'
y: D b
y': D' b'
ff: x -->[ f] y
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
! id_left f = maponpaths pr1 (! id_left (f,, f'))

        apply C.

C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
a: C
a': C'
b: C
b': C'
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧

x': D' a'
y: D b
y': D' b'
ff: x -->[ f] y
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
?b =
pr2
  (transportb (mor_disp (x,, x') (y,, y'))
     (id_left (f,, f')) (ff,, ff'))
 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
a: C
a': C'
b: C
b': C'
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x: D a
x': D' a'
y: D b
y': D' b'
ff: x -->[ f] y
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
transportb (mor_disp x' y') (id_left f') ff' =
pr2
  (transportb (mor_disp (x,, x') (y,, y'))
     (id_left (f,, f')) (ff,, ff'))

C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
∏ (x y : C ⊠ C') (f : C ⊠ C' ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(xx : disp_binprod_data x)
(yy : pr1 disp_binprod_data y) (ff : xx -->[ f] yy),
ff ;; id_disp yy =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy) (id_right f) ff

ff: pr1 (x,, x') -->[ pr1 (f,, f')] pr1 (y,, y')
ff': pr2 (x,, x') -->[ pr2 (f,, f')] pr2 (y,, y')
(ff,, ff') ;; id_disp (y,, y') =
transportb (mor_disp (x,, x') (y,, y'))
  (id_right (f,, f')) (ff,, ff')

C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
∏ (x y z w : C ⊠ C') (f : C ⊠ C' ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : C ⊠ C' ⟦ y, z ⟧) (h : C ⊠ C' ⟦ z, w ⟧)
(xx : disp_binprod_data x) (yy : disp_binprod_data y)
(zz : disp_binprod_data z) (ww : disp_binprod_data w)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz)
(hh : zz -->[ h] ww),
ff ;; (gg ;; hh) =
transportb (mor_disp xx ww) (assoc f g h)
  (ff ;; gg ;; hh)
 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
a: C
a': C'
b: C
b': C'
c: C
c': C'
d: C
d': C'
f: C ⟦ pr1 (a,, a'), pr1 (b,, b') ⟧
f': C' ⟦ pr2 (a,, a'), pr2 (b,, b') ⟧
g: C ⟦ pr1 (b,, b'), pr1 (c,, c') ⟧
g': C' ⟦ pr2 (b,, b'), pr2 (c,, c') ⟧
h: C ⟦ pr1 (c,, c'), pr1 (d,, d') ⟧
h': C' ⟦ pr2 (c,, c'), pr2 (d,, d') ⟧
x: D (pr1 (a,, a'))
x': D' (pr2 (a,, a'))
y: D (pr1 (b,, b'))
y': D' (pr2 (b,, b'))
z: D (pr1 (c,, c'))
z': D' (pr2 (c,, c'))
w: D (pr1 (d,, d'))
w': D' (pr2 (d,, d'))
u: pr1 (x,, x') -->[ pr1 (f,, f')] pr1 (y,, y')
u': pr2 (x,, x') -->[ pr2 (f,, f')] pr2 (y,, y')
v: pr1 (y,, y') -->[ pr1 (g,, g')] pr1 (z,, z')
v': pr2 (y,, y') -->[ pr2 (g,, g')] pr2 (z,, z')
r: pr1 (z,, z') -->[ pr1 (h,, h')] pr1 (w,, w')
r': pr2 (z,, z') -->[ pr2 (h,, h')] pr2 (w,, w')
(u,, u') ;; ((v,, v') ;; (r,, r')) =
transportb (mor_disp (x,, x') (w,, w'))
  (assoc (f,, f') (g,, g') (h,, h'))
  ((u,, u') ;; (v,, v') ;; (r,, r'))

r: z -->[ h] w
r': z' -->[ h'] w'
(u,, u') ;; ((v,, v') ;; (r,, r')) =

  (assoc (f,, f') (g,, g') (h,, h'))
  ((u,, u') ;; (v,, v') ;; (r,, r'))

f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g': C' ⟦ b', c' ⟧
h: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
h': C' ⟦ c', d' ⟧
x: D a
x': D' a'
y: D b
y': D' b'
z: D c
z': D' c'
w: D d
w': D' d'
u: x -->[ f] y
u': x' -->[ f'] y'
v: y -->[ g] z
v': y' -->[ g'] z'
r: z -->[ h] w
r': z' -->[ h'] w'
u ;; (v ;; r) = ?b
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
a: C
a': C'
b: C
b': C'
c: C
c': C'
d: C
d': C'
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g': C' ⟦ b', c' ⟧
h: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
h': C' ⟦ c', d' ⟧
x: D a
x': D' a'
y: D b
y': D' b'
z: D c
z': D' c'
w: D d
w': D' d'
u: x -->[ f] y
u': x' -->[ f'] y'
v: y -->[ g] z
v': y' -->[ g'] z'
r: z -->[ h] w
r': z' -->[ h'] w'
?b =
pr1
  (transportb (mor_disp (x,, x') (w,, w'))
     (assoc (f,, f') (g,, g') (h,, h'))
     ((u,, u') ;; (v,, v') ;; (r,, r')))

transportb (mor_disp x w) (assoc f g h) (u ;; v ;; r) =
pr1

     (assoc (f,, f') (g,, g') (h,, h'))
     ((u,, u') ;; (v,, v') ;; (r,, r')))

 apply disp_binprod_transportf_pr1. 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
a: C
a': C'
b: C
b': C'
c: C
c': C'
d: C
d': C'
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
g': C' ⟦ b', c' ⟧
h: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
h': C' ⟦ c', d' ⟧
x: D a
x': D' a'
y: D b
y': D' b'
z: D c
z': D' c'
w: D d
w': D' d'
u: x -->[ f] y
u': x' -->[ f'] y'
v: y -->[ g] z
v': y' -->[ g'] z'
r: z -->[ h] w
r': z' -->[ h'] w'
transportb (mor_disp x w) (assoc f g h) (u ;; v ;; r) =
transportf (mor_disp x w)
  (maponpaths pr1 (! assoc (f,, f') (g,, g') (h,, h')))
  (pr1 ((u,, u') ;; (v,, v')) ;; pr1 (r,, r'))

v': y' -->[ g'] z'
r: z -->[ h] w
r': z' -->[ h'] w'
! assoc f g h =
maponpaths pr1 (! assoc (f,, f') (g,, g') (h,, h'))

        apply C.

  (! assoc (f,, f') (g,, g') (h,, h'))

C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
∏ (x y : C ⊠ C') (f : C ⊠ C' ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(xx : disp_binprod_data x) (yy : disp_binprod_data y),
isaset (xx -->[ f] yy)

D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
x, y: C ⊠ C'
f: C ⊠ C' ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: disp_binprod_data x
yy: disp_binprod_data y
isaset (xx -->[ f] yy)

      
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
x, y: C ⊠ C'
f: C ⊠ C' ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: disp_binprod_data x
yy: disp_binprod_data y
isofhlevel 2 (pr1 xx -->[ pr1 f] pr1 yy)

f: C ⊠ C' ⟦ x, y ⟧

D': disp_cat C'
x, y: C ⊠ C'
f: C ⊠ C' ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: disp_binprod_data x
yy: disp_binprod_data y
isofhlevel 2 (pr1 xx -->[ pr1 f] pr1 yy)
 apply D.
      
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
x, y: C ⊠ C'
f: C ⊠ C' ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: disp_binprod_data x
yy: disp_binprod_data y
isofhlevel 2 (pr2 xx -->[ pr2 f] pr2 yy)
 apply D'.
  Qed.

  Definition disp_binprod : disp_cat (C ⊠ C')
    :=  disp_binprod_data ,,  disp_binprod_axioms.

End DispCartProdOfCats.

Notation "D ⊠⊠ D'" := (disp_binprod D D') (at level 60).


Section TotalDispProd.

(**
We can build the total category of a [disp_binprod D D'], or we can take the cartesian product of two total categories.
 *)

 Context {C C' : category}
         (D : disp_cat C)
         (D' : disp_cat C').

 Let T : category := total_category (D ⊠⊠ D').
 Let T' : category := total_category D ⊠ total_category D'.

 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
T:= total_category (D ⊠⊠ D'): category
T':= total_category D ⊠ total_category D': category
functor_data T T'

 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
T:= total_category (D ⊠⊠ D'): category
T':= total_category D ⊠ total_category D': category
functor_data T T'

   
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
T:= total_category (D ⊠⊠ D'): category
T':= total_category D ⊠ total_category D': category
T → T'
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
T:= total_category (D ⊠⊠ D'): category
T':= total_category D ⊠ total_category D': category
(λ F : T → T', ∏ a b : T, T ⟦ a, b ⟧ → T' ⟦ F a, F b ⟧)
  ?pr1

   
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
T:= total_category (D ⊠⊠ D'): category
T':= total_category D ⊠ total_category D': category
T → T'
 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
T:= total_category (D ⊠⊠ D'): category
T':= total_category D ⊠ total_category D': category
c: C
c': C'
d: D (pr1 (c,, c'))
d': D' (pr2 (c,, c'))
T'

     exact (make_dirprod (c,,d) (c',,d')).
   
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
T:= total_category (D ⊠⊠ D'): category
T':= total_category D ⊠ total_category D': category
(λ F : T → T', ∏ a b : T, T ⟦ a, b ⟧ → T' ⟦ F a, F b ⟧)
  (λ X : T,
   (λ pr1 : C ⊠ C',
    (λ (c : C) (c' : C') (pr2 : (D ⊠⊠ D') (c,, c')),
     (λ (d : D (Preamble.pr1 (c,, c')))
      (d' : D' (Preamble.pr2 (c,, c'))),
      make_dirprod (c,, d) (c',, d'))
       (Preamble.pr1 pr2) (Preamble.pr2 pr2))
      (Preamble.pr1 pr1) (pr2 pr1)) (pr1 X) (pr2 X))
 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
T:= total_category (D ⊠⊠ D'): category
T':= total_category D ⊠ total_category D': category
∏ a b : ∑ x : C × C', D (pr1 x) × D' (pr2 x),
(∑
 f : precategory_binproduct_mor C C' (pr1 a) (pr1 b),
 pr12 a -->[ pr1 f] pr12 b × pr22 a -->[ pr2 f] pr22 b)
→ precategory_binproduct_mor (total_category_ob_mor D)
    (total_category_ob_mor D')
    (make_dirprod (pr11 a,, pr12 a) (pr21 a,, pr22 a))
    (make_dirprod (pr11 b,, pr12 b) (pr21 b,, pr22 b))
 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
T:= total_category (D ⊠⊠ D'): category
T':= total_category D ⊠ total_category D': category
a: C
a': C'
d: D (pr1 (a,, a'))
d': D' (pr2 (a,, a'))
b: C
b': C'
e: D (pr1 (b,, b'))
e': D' (pr2 (b,, b'))
f: C ⟦ pr11 ((a,, a'),, d,, d'),
pr11 ((b,, b'),, e,, e') ⟧
f': C' ⟦ pr21 ((a,, a'),, d,, d'),
pr21 ((b,, b'),, e,, e') ⟧
g: pr12 ((a,, a'),, d,, d') -->[
pr1 (f,, f')] pr12 ((b,, b'),, e,, e')
g': pr22 ((a,, a'),, d,, d') -->[
pr2 (f,, f')] pr22 ((b,, b'),, e,, e')
precategory_binproduct_mor (total_category_ob_mor D)
  (total_category_ob_mor D')
  (make_dirprod (a,, d) (a',, d'))
  (make_dirprod (b,, e) (b',, e'))

     exact (make_dirprod (f,,g) (f',,g')).
 Defined.



 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
T:= total_category (D ⊠⊠ D'): category
T':= total_category D ⊠ total_category D': category
is_functor reord1_functor_data

C, C': category

C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
T:= total_category (D ⊠⊠ D'): category
T':= total_category D ⊠ total_category D': category
a: T
(# reord1_functor_data)%cat (id a) =
id reord1_functor_data a

     apply idpath.
   
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
T:= total_category (D ⊠⊠ D'): category
T':= total_category D ⊠ total_category D': category

C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
T:= total_category (D ⊠⊠ D'): category
T':= total_category D ⊠ total_category D': category
a, b, c: T
f: T ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: T ⟦ b, c ⟧
(# reord1_functor_data)%cat (f · g) =
(# reord1_functor_data)%cat f
· (# reord1_functor_data)%cat g

     apply idpath.
 Qed.

 Definition reord1_functor : functor T T' := reord1_functor_data ,, reord1_functor_axioms.

D': disp_cat C'
T:= total_category (D ⊠⊠ D'): category
T':= total_category D ⊠ total_category D': category
a, b: T
c: C ⟦ pr11 (reord1_functor a),
pr11 (reord1_functor b) ⟧
d: pr21 (reord1_functor a) -->[
c] pr21 (reord1_functor b)
c': C' ⟦ pr12 (reord1_functor a),
pr12 (reord1_functor b) ⟧
d': pr22 (reord1_functor a) -->[
c'] pr22 (reord1_functor b)
T ⟦ a, b ⟧

   
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
T:= total_category (D ⊠⊠ D'): category
T':= total_category D ⊠ total_category D': category
a, b: ∑ x : C × C', D (pr1 x) × D' (pr2 x)
c: C ⟦ pr11 a, pr11 b ⟧
d: pr12 a -->[ c] pr12 b
c': C' ⟦ pr21 a, pr21 b ⟧
d': pr22 a -->[ c'] pr22 b
∑ f : precategory_binproduct_mor C C' (pr1 a) (pr1 b),
pr12 a -->[ pr1 f] pr12 b × pr22 a -->[ pr2 f] pr22 b

   
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
T:= total_category (D ⊠⊠ D'): category
T':= total_category D ⊠ total_category D': category

c: C ⟦ pr11 a, pr11 b ⟧
d: pr12 a -->[ c] pr12 b
c': C' ⟦ pr21 a, pr21 b ⟧
d': pr22 a -->[ c'] pr22 b
precategory_binproduct_mor C C' (pr1 a) (pr1 b)
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
T:= total_category (D ⊠⊠ D'): category
T':= total_category D ⊠ total_category D': category
a, b: ∑ x : C × C', D (pr1 x) × D' (pr2 x)
c: C ⟦ pr11 a, pr11 b ⟧
d: pr12 a -->[ c] pr12 b
c': C' ⟦ pr21 a, pr21 b ⟧
d': pr22 a -->[ c'] pr22 b
(λ f : precategory_binproduct_mor C C' (pr1 a) (pr1 b),
 pr12 a -->[ pr1 f] pr12 b × pr22 a -->[ pr2 f] pr22 b)
  ?pr1

   
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
T:= total_category (D ⊠⊠ D'): category
T':= total_category D ⊠ total_category D': category
a, b: ∑ x : C × C', D (pr1 x) × D' (pr2 x)
c: C ⟦ pr11 a, pr11 b ⟧
d: pr12 a -->[ c] pr12 b
c': C' ⟦ pr21 a, pr21 b ⟧
d': pr22 a -->[ c'] pr22 b
precategory_binproduct_mor C C' (pr1 a) (pr1 b)
 exact (make_dirprod c c').
   
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
T:= total_category (D ⊠⊠ D'): category
T':= total_category D ⊠ total_category D': category
a, b: ∑ x : C × C', D (pr1 x) × D' (pr2 x)
c: C ⟦ pr11 a, pr11 b ⟧
d: pr12 a -->[ c] pr12 b
c': C' ⟦ pr21 a, pr21 b ⟧
d': pr22 a -->[ c'] pr22 b
(λ f : precategory_binproduct_mor C C' (pr1 a) (pr1 b),
 pr12 a -->[ pr1 f] pr12 b × pr22 a -->[ pr2 f] pr22 b)
  (make_dirprod c c')
 
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'

c: C ⟦ pr11 a, pr11 b ⟧
d: pr12 a -->[ c] pr12 b
c': C' ⟦ pr21 a, pr21 b ⟧
d': pr22 a -->[ c'] pr22 b
pr12 a -->[ c] pr12 b × pr22 a -->[ c'] pr22 b
 exact (make_dirprod d d').
 Defined.

 Defined.

 Definition catiso_reord : catiso T T' := _ ,, is_catiso_reord_functor .

End TotalDispProd.


Definition total_bifunctor
           {C D E : category}
           (F : C ⊠ D ⟶ E)
           {DC : disp_cat C}
           {DD : disp_cat D}
           {DE : disp_cat E}
           (FF : disp_functor F (DC ⊠⊠ DD) DE)
  : total_category DC ⊠ total_category DD ⟶ total_category DE
  := inv_catiso (catiso_reord DC DD) ∙ total_functor FF.



C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
a, b: C
a', b': C'
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f', g': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
x': D' a'
y': D' b'
ff: x -->[ f] y
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
e: f,, f' = g,, g'
transportf (mor_disp (x,, x') (y,, y')) e (ff,, ff') =
transportf (mor_disp x y) (maponpaths pr1 e) ff,,
transportf (mor_disp x' y') (maponpaths dirprod_pr2 e)
  ff'


C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
a, b: C
a', b': C'
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f', g': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
x': D' a'
y': D' b'
ff: x -->[ f] y
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
e: f,, f' = g,, g'
transportf (mor_disp (x,, x') (y,, y')) e (ff,, ff') =
transportf (mor_disp x y) (maponpaths pr1 e) ff,,
transportf (mor_disp x' y') (maponpaths dirprod_pr2 e)
  ff'

  
C, C': category
D: disp_cat C
D': disp_cat C'
a, b: C
a', b': C'
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f', g': C' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
x: D a
y: D b
x': D' a'
y': D' b'
ff: x -->[ f] y
ff': x' -->[ f'] y'
transportf (mor_disp (x,, x') (y,, y'))
  (idpath (f,, f')) (ff,, ff') =
transportf (mor_disp x y)
  (maponpaths pr1 (idpath (f,, f'))) ff,,
transportf (mor_disp x' y')
  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2 (idpath (f,, f'))) ff'

  apply idpath.
Qed.


Section DispCartProdOfFunctors.

  Context {A A' C C' : category}
          {F : functor A C}
          {F' : functor A' C'}
          {D : disp_cat A}
          {D' : disp_cat A'}
          {E : disp_cat C}
          {E' : disp_cat C'}
          (G : disp_functor F D E)
          (G' : disp_functor F' D' E').

  
A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A
D': disp_cat A'
E: disp_cat C
E': disp_cat C'
G: disp_functor F D E
G': disp_functor F' D' E'
disp_functor_data (pair_functor F F') (D ⊠⊠ D')
  (E ⊠⊠ E')

  
A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A
D': disp_cat A'
E: disp_cat C
E': disp_cat C'
G: disp_functor F D E
G': disp_functor F' D' E'
disp_functor_data (pair_functor F F') (D ⊠⊠ D')
  (E ⊠⊠ E')

    
A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A
D': disp_cat A'
E: disp_cat C
E': disp_cat C'
G: disp_functor F D E
G': disp_functor F' D' E'
∏ x : A ⊠ A',
(D ⊠⊠ D') x → (E ⊠⊠ E') (pair_functor F F' x)
A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A
D': disp_cat A'
E: disp_cat C
E': disp_cat C'
G: disp_functor F D E
G': disp_functor F' D' E'
(λ Fob : ∏ x : A ⊠ A',
         (D ⊠⊠ D') x → (E ⊠⊠ E') (pair_functor F F' x),
 ∏ (x y : A ⊠ A') (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D') x)
 (yy : (D ⊠⊠ D') y) (f : A ⊠ A' ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 xx -->[ f] yy
 → Fob x xx -->[
   (# (pair_functor F F'))%cat f] Fob y yy) ?pr1

    
A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A
D': disp_cat A'
E: disp_cat C
E': disp_cat C'
G: disp_functor F D E
G': disp_functor F' D' E'
∏ x : A ⊠ A',
(D ⊠⊠ D') x → (E ⊠⊠ E') (pair_functor F F' x)
 
A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A
D': disp_cat A'
E: disp_cat C
E': disp_cat C'
G: disp_functor F D E
G': disp_functor F' D' E'
aa': A ⊠ A'
dd': (D ⊠⊠ D') aa'
(E ⊠⊠ E') (pair_functor F F' aa')

      
A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A
D': disp_cat A'
E: disp_cat C
E': disp_cat C'
G: disp_functor F D E
G': disp_functor F' D' E'
aa': A ⊠ A'
dd': (D ⊠⊠ D') aa'
E (pr1 (pair_functor F F' aa'))
A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A

E: disp_cat C
E': disp_cat C'

aa': A ⊠ A'
dd': (D ⊠⊠ D') aa'
E' (pr2 (pair_functor F F' aa'))

      
A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A
D': disp_cat A'
E: disp_cat C
E': disp_cat C'
G: disp_functor F D E
G': disp_functor F' D' E'
aa': A ⊠ A'
dd': (D ⊠⊠ D') aa'
E (pr1 (pair_functor F F' aa'))
 
A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A
D': disp_cat A'

E': disp_cat C'

aa': A ⊠ A'
dd': (D ⊠⊠ D') aa'
D (pr1 aa')
 apply (pr1 dd').
      
A, A', C, C': category

F': A' ⟶ C'

E' (pr2 (pair_functor F F' aa'))
 
A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A
D': disp_cat A'
E: disp_cat C
E': disp_cat C'

G': disp_functor F' D' E'

dd': (D ⊠⊠ D') aa'
D' (pr2 aa')
 apply (pr2 dd').
    
A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A
D': disp_cat A'
E: disp_cat C
E': disp_cat C'
G: disp_functor F D E
G': disp_functor F' D' E'
(λ Fob : ∏ x : A ⊠ A',
         (D ⊠⊠ D') x → (E ⊠⊠ E') (pair_functor F F' x),
 ∏ (x y : A ⊠ A') (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D') x)
 (yy : (D ⊠⊠ D') y) (f : A ⊠ A' ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 xx -->[ f] yy
 → Fob x xx -->[
   (# (pair_functor F F'))%cat f] Fob y yy)
  (λ (aa' : A ⊠ A') (dd' : (D ⊠⊠ D') aa'),
   make_dirprod (G (pr1 aa') (pr1 dd'))
     (G' (pr2 aa') (pr2 dd')))
 
A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A
D': disp_cat A'
E: disp_cat C
E': disp_cat C'
G: disp_functor F D E
G': disp_functor F' D' E'
∏ (x y : A × A') (xx : D (pr1 x) × D' (pr2 x))
(yy : D (pr1 y) × D' (pr2 y))
(f : precategory_binproduct_mor A A' x y),
pr1 xx -->[ pr1 f] pr1 yy × pr2 xx -->[ pr2 f] pr2 yy
→ G (pr1 x) (pr1 xx) -->[
  (# F)%cat (pr1 f)] G (pr1 y) (pr1 yy)
  × G' (pr2 x) (pr2 xx) -->[
    (# F')%cat (pr2 f)] G' (pr2 y) (pr2 yy)
 
A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A
D': disp_cat A'
E: disp_cat C
E': disp_cat C'
G: disp_functor F D E
G': disp_functor F' D' E'
aa', aa'': A × A'
xx': D (pr1 aa') × D' (pr2 aa')
yy': D (pr1 aa'') × D' (pr2 aa'')
ff': precategory_binproduct_mor A A' aa' aa''
gg': pr1 xx' -->[ pr1 ff'] pr1 yy'
× pr2 xx' -->[ pr2 ff'] pr2 yy'
G (pr1 aa') (pr1 xx') -->[
(# F)%cat (pr1 ff')] G (pr1 aa'') (pr1 yy')
× G' (pr2 aa') (pr2 xx') -->[
  (# F')%cat (pr2 ff')] G' (pr2 aa'') (pr2 yy')

F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A

aa', aa'': A × A'

yy': D (pr1 aa'') × D' (pr2 aa'')
ff': precategory_binproduct_mor A A' aa' aa''
gg': pr1 xx' -->[ pr1 ff'] pr1 yy'
× pr2 xx' -->[ pr2 ff'] pr2 yy'
G (pr1 aa') (pr1 xx') -->[
(# F)%cat (pr1 ff')] G (pr1 aa'') (pr1 yy')

× pr2 xx' -->[ pr2 ff'] pr2 yy'

× pr2 xx' -->[ pr2 ff'] pr2 yy'

A, A', C, C': category

yy': D (pr1 aa'') × D' (pr2 aa'')
ff': precategory_binproduct_mor A A' aa' aa''
gg': pr1 xx' -->[ pr1 ff'] pr1 yy'
× pr2 xx' -->[ pr2 ff'] pr2 yy'
pr1 xx' -->[ pr1 ff'] pr1 yy'
 apply (pr1 gg').

× pr2 xx' -->[ pr2 ff'] pr2 yy'

aa', aa'': A × A'

yy': D (pr1 aa'') × D' (pr2 aa'')
ff': precategory_binproduct_mor A A' aa' aa''
gg': pr1 xx' -->[ pr1 ff'] pr1 yy'
× pr2 xx' -->[ pr2 ff'] pr2 yy'
pr2 xx' -->[ pr2 ff'] pr2 yy'
 apply (pr2 gg').
  Defined.

  
A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A
D': disp_cat A'
E: disp_cat C
E': disp_cat C'
G: disp_functor F D E
G': disp_functor F' D' E'
disp_functor_axioms disp_pair_functor_data

  
A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A
D': disp_cat A'
E: disp_cat C
E': disp_cat C'
G: disp_functor F D E
G': disp_functor F' D' E'
disp_functor_axioms disp_pair_functor_data

    
A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A
D': disp_cat A'
E: disp_cat C
E': disp_cat C'
G: disp_functor F D E
G': disp_functor F' D' E'
∏ (x : A ⊠ A') (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D') x),
♯ disp_pair_functor_data (id_disp xx) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (disp_pair_functor_data x xx)
     (disp_pair_functor_data x xx))
  (functor_id (pair_functor F F') x)
  (id_disp (disp_pair_functor_data x xx))
A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A
D': disp_cat A'
E: disp_cat C
E': disp_cat C'
G: disp_functor F D E
G': disp_functor F' D' E'
∏ (x y z : A ⊠ A') (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D') x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D') y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D') z)
(f : A ⊠ A' ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : A ⊠ A' ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ disp_pair_functor_data (ff ;; gg) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (disp_pair_functor_data x xx)
     (disp_pair_functor_data z zz))
  (functor_comp (pair_functor F F') f g)
  (♯ disp_pair_functor_data ff ;; ♯ disp_pair_functor_data
                                    gg)

    
A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A
D': disp_cat A'
E: disp_cat C
E': disp_cat C'
G: disp_functor F D E
G': disp_functor F' D' E'
∏ (x : A ⊠ A') (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D') x),
♯ disp_pair_functor_data (id_disp xx) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (disp_pair_functor_data x xx)
     (disp_pair_functor_data x xx))
  (functor_id (pair_functor F F') x)
  (id_disp (disp_pair_functor_data x xx))
 
A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A
D': disp_cat A'
E: disp_cat C
E': disp_cat C'
G: disp_functor F D E
G': disp_functor F' D' E'
a: A
a': A'
d: D (pr1 (a,, a'))
d': D' (pr2 (a,, a'))
♯ disp_pair_functor_data (id_disp (d,, d')) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (disp_pair_functor_data (a,, a') (d,, d'))
     (disp_pair_functor_data (a,, a') (d,, d')))
  (functor_id (pair_functor F F') (a,, a'))
  (id_disp (disp_pair_functor_data (a,, a') (d,, d')))

      
A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A
D': disp_cat A'
E: disp_cat C
E': disp_cat C'
G: disp_functor F D E
G': disp_functor F' D' E'
a: A
a': A'
d: D (pr1 (a,, a'))
d': D' (pr2 (a,, a'))
transportb
  (mor_disp (disp_pair_functor_data (a,, a') (d,, d'))
     (disp_pair_functor_data (a,, a') (d,, d')))
  (functor_id (pair_functor F F') (a,, a'))
  (id_disp (disp_pair_functor_data (a,, a') (d,, d'))) =
♯ disp_pair_functor_data (id_disp (d,, d'))

      
A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A
D': disp_cat A'
E: disp_cat C
E': disp_cat C'
G: disp_functor F D E
G': disp_functor F' D' E'
a: A
a': A'
d: D (pr1 (a,, a'))
d': D' (pr2 (a,, a'))
transportb
  (mor_disp (disp_pair_functor_data (a,, a') (d,, d'))
     (disp_pair_functor_data (a,, a') (d,, d')))
  (functor_id (pair_functor F F') (a,, a'))
  (id_disp (disp_pair_functor_data (a,, a') (d,, d'))) =
?b
A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A
D': disp_cat A'
E: disp_cat C
E': disp_cat C'
G: disp_functor F D E
G': disp_functor F' D' E'
a: A
a': A'
d: D (pr1 (a,, a'))
d': D' (pr2 (a,, a'))
?b = ♯ disp_pair_functor_data (id_disp (d,, d'))
 
A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A
D': disp_cat A'
E: disp_cat C
E': disp_cat C'
G: disp_functor F D E
G': disp_functor F' D' E'
a: A
a': A'
d: D (pr1 (a,, a'))
d': D' (pr2 (a,, a'))
transportb
  (mor_disp (disp_pair_functor_data (a,, a') (d,, d'))
     (disp_pair_functor_data (a,, a') (d,, d')))
  (functor_id (pair_functor F F') (a,, a'))
  (id_disp (disp_pair_functor_data (a,, a') (d,, d'))) =
?b
 apply disp_binprod_transportf. 
A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A
D': disp_cat A'
E: disp_cat C
E': disp_cat C'
G: disp_functor F D E
G': disp_functor F' D' E'
a: A
a': A'
d: D (pr1 (a,, a'))
d': D' (pr2 (a,, a'))
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr1 (disp_pair_functor_data (a,, a') (d,, d')))
     (pr1 (disp_pair_functor_data (a,, a') (d,, d'))))
  (maponpaths pr1
     (! functor_id (pair_functor F F') (a,, a')))
  (id_disp
     (pr1 (disp_pair_functor_data (a,, a') (d,, d')))),,
transportf
  (mor_disp
     (pr2 (disp_pair_functor_data (a,, a') (d,, d')))
     (pr2 (disp_pair_functor_data (a,, a') (d,, d'))))
  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
     (! functor_id (pair_functor F F') (a,, a')))
  (id_disp
     (pr2 (disp_pair_functor_data (a,, a') (d,, d')))) =
♯ disp_pair_functor_data (id_disp (d,, d'))

      
A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A
D': disp_cat A'
E: disp_cat C
E': disp_cat C'
G: disp_functor F D E
G': disp_functor F' D' E'
a: A
a': A'
d: D (pr1 (a,, a'))
d': D' (pr2 (a,, a'))
transportf (mor_disp (G a d) (G a d))
  (maponpaths pr1
     (! functor_id (pair_functor F F') (a,, a')))
  (id_disp (G a d)),,
transportf (mor_disp (G' a' d') (G' a' d'))
  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
     (! functor_id (pair_functor F F') (a,, a')))
  (id_disp (G' a' d')) =
make_dirprod (♯ G (id_disp d)) (♯ G' (id_disp d'))

      
A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A
D': disp_cat A'
E: disp_cat C
E': disp_cat C'
G: disp_functor F D E
G': disp_functor F' D' E'
a: A
a': A'
d: D (pr1 (a,, a'))
d': D' (pr2 (a,, a'))
transportf (mor_disp (G a d) (G a d))
  (maponpaths pr1
     (! functor_id (pair_functor F F') (a,, a')))
  (id_disp (G a d)) = ♯ G (id_disp d)
A, A', C, C': category

D: disp_cat A

E: disp_cat C

G: disp_functor F D E
G': disp_functor F' D' E'
a: A
a': A'
d: D (pr1 (a,, a'))
d': D' (pr2 (a,, a'))
transportf (mor_disp (G' a' d') (G' a' d'))
  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
     (! functor_id (pair_functor F F') (a,, a')))
  (id_disp (G' a' d')) = ♯ G' (id_disp d')

      
A, A', C, C': category

D: disp_cat A

a: A
a': A'

d': D' (pr2 (a,, a'))
transportf (mor_disp (G a d) (G a d))
  (maponpaths pr1
     (! functor_id (pair_functor F F') (a,, a')))
  (id_disp (G a d)) = ♯ G (id_disp d)
 
A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A
D': disp_cat A'
E: disp_cat C
E': disp_cat C'
G: disp_functor F D E
G': disp_functor F' D' E'
a: A
a': A'
d: D (pr1 (a,, a'))
d': D' (pr2 (a,, a'))
♯ G (id_disp d) =
transportf (mor_disp (G a d) (G a d))
  (maponpaths pr1
     (! functor_id (pair_functor F F') (a,, a')))
  (id_disp (G a d))

A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A

E': disp_cat C'
G: disp_functor F D E
G': disp_functor F' D' E'
a: A
a': A'
d: D (pr1 (a,, a'))
d': D' (pr2 (a,, a'))
?b =
transportf (mor_disp (G a d) (G a d))
  (maponpaths pr1

A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A
D': disp_cat A'
E: disp_cat C
E': disp_cat C'
G: disp_functor F D E
G': disp_functor F' D' E'
a: A
a': A'
d: D (pr1 (a,, a'))
d': D' (pr2 (a,, a'))
transportb (mor_disp (G a d) (G a d)) (functor_id F a)
  (id_disp (G a d)) =
transportf (mor_disp (G a d) (G a d))
  (maponpaths pr1
     (! functor_id (pair_functor F F') (a,, a')))
  (id_disp (G a d))

        
A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A
D': disp_cat A'
E: disp_cat C
E': disp_cat C'
G: disp_functor F D E
G': disp_functor F' D' E'
a: A
a': A'
d: D (pr1 (a,, a'))
d': D' (pr2 (a,, a'))
! functor_id F a =
maponpaths pr1
  (! functor_id (pair_functor F F') (a,, a'))
 apply C.
      
A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A
D': disp_cat A'
E: disp_cat C
E': disp_cat C'
G: disp_functor F D E
G': disp_functor F' D' E'
a: A
a': A'
d: D (pr1 (a,, a'))
d': D' (pr2 (a,, a'))
transportf (mor_disp (G' a' d') (G' a' d'))
  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
     (! functor_id (pair_functor F F') (a,, a')))
  (id_disp (G' a' d')) = ♯ G' (id_disp d')

a: A

  (functor_id F' a') (id_disp (G' a' d')) =

A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'

G': disp_functor F' D' E'
a: A
a': A'
d: D (pr1 (a,, a'))
d': D' (pr2 (a,, a'))
! functor_id F' a' =

  (! functor_id (pair_functor F F') (a,, a'))
 apply C'.
    
A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A
D': disp_cat A'
E: disp_cat C
E': disp_cat C'
G: disp_functor F D E
G': disp_functor F' D' E'
∏ (x y z : A ⊠ A') (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D') x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D') y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D') z)
(f : A ⊠ A' ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : A ⊠ A' ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ disp_pair_functor_data (ff ;; gg) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (disp_pair_functor_data x xx)
     (disp_pair_functor_data z zz))
  (functor_comp (pair_functor F F') f g)
  (♯ disp_pair_functor_data ff ;; ♯ disp_pair_functor_data
                                    gg)
 
A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A
D': disp_cat A'
E: disp_cat C
E': disp_cat C'
G: disp_functor F D E
G': disp_functor F' D' E'
a: A
a': A'
b: A
b': A'
c: A
c': A'
w: D (pr1 (a,, a'))
w': D' (pr2 (a,, a'))
x: D (pr1 (b,, b'))
x': D' (pr2 (b,, b'))
y: D (pr1 (c,, c'))
y': D' (pr2 (c,, c'))
f: A ⟦ pr1 (a,, a'), pr1 (b,, b') ⟧
f': A' ⟦ pr2 (a,, a'), pr2 (b,, b') ⟧
g: A ⟦ pr1 (b,, b'), pr1 (c,, c') ⟧
g': A' ⟦ pr2 (b,, b'), pr2 (c,, c') ⟧
ff: pr1 (w,, w') -->[ pr1 (f,, f')] pr1 (x,, x')
ff': pr2 (w,, w') -->[ pr2 (f,, f')] pr2 (x,, x')
gg: pr1 (x,, x') -->[ pr1 (g,, g')] pr1 (y,, y')
gg': pr2 (x,, x') -->[ pr2 (g,, g')] pr2 (y,, y')
♯ disp_pair_functor_data ((ff,, ff') ;; (gg,, gg')) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (disp_pair_functor_data (a,, a') (w,, w'))
     (disp_pair_functor_data (c,, c') (y,, y')))
  (functor_comp (pair_functor F F') (f,, f') (g,, g'))
  (♯ disp_pair_functor_data (ff,, ff') ;; ♯ disp_pair_functor_data
                                            (gg,, gg'))

      
A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A
D': disp_cat A'
E: disp_cat C
E': disp_cat C'
G: disp_functor F D E
G': disp_functor F' D' E'
a: A
a': A'
b: A
b': A'
c: A
c': A'
w: D a
w': D' a'
x: D b
x': D' b'
y: D c
y': D' c'
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': A' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
g': A' ⟦ b', c' ⟧
ff: w -->[ f] x
ff': w' -->[ f'] x'
gg: x -->[ g] y
gg': x' -->[ g'] y'
make_dirprod (♯ G (ff ;; gg)) (♯ G' (ff' ;; gg')) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (make_dirprod (G a w) (G' a' w'))
     (make_dirprod (G c y) (G' c' y')))
  (functor_comp (pair_functor F F') (f,, f') (g,, g'))
  (make_dirprod (♯ G ff ;; ♯ G gg)
     (♯ G' ff' ;; ♯ G' gg'))

      
A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A
D': disp_cat A'
E: disp_cat C
E': disp_cat C'
G: disp_functor F D E
G': disp_functor F' D' E'
a: A
a': A'
b: A
b': A'
c: A
c': A'
w: D a
w': D' a'
x: D b
x': D' b'
y: D c
y': D' c'
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': A' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
g': A' ⟦ b', c' ⟧
ff: w -->[ f] x
ff': w' -->[ f'] x'
gg: x -->[ g] y
gg': x' -->[ g'] y'
transportb
  (mor_disp (make_dirprod (G a w) (G' a' w'))
     (make_dirprod (G c y) (G' c' y')))
  (functor_comp (pair_functor F F') (f,, f') (g,, g'))
  (make_dirprod (♯ G ff ;; ♯ G gg)
     (♯ G' ff' ;; ♯ G' gg')) =
make_dirprod (♯ G (ff ;; gg)) (♯ G' (ff' ;; gg'))

      
A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A
D': disp_cat A'
E: disp_cat C
E': disp_cat C'
G: disp_functor F D E
G': disp_functor F' D' E'
a: A
a': A'
b: A
b': A'
c: A
c': A'
w: D a
w': D' a'
x: D b
x': D' b'
y: D c
y': D' c'
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': A' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
g': A' ⟦ b', c' ⟧
ff: w -->[ f] x
ff': w' -->[ f'] x'
gg: x -->[ g] y
gg': x' -->[ g'] y'
transportb
  (mor_disp (make_dirprod (G a w) (G' a' w'))
     (make_dirprod (G c y) (G' c' y')))
  (functor_comp (pair_functor F F') (f,, f') (g,, g'))
  (make_dirprod (♯ G ff ;; ♯ G gg)
     (♯ G' ff' ;; ♯ G' gg')) = ?b

g': A' ⟦ b', c' ⟧
ff: w -->[ f] x
ff': w' -->[ f'] x'
gg: x -->[ g] y
gg': x' -->[ g'] y'
?b = make_dirprod (♯ G (ff ;; gg)) (♯ G' (ff' ;; gg'))
 
A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A
D': disp_cat A'
E: disp_cat C
E': disp_cat C'
G: disp_functor F D E
G': disp_functor F' D' E'
a: A
a': A'
b: A
b': A'
c: A
c': A'
w: D a
w': D' a'
x: D b
x': D' b'
y: D c
y': D' c'
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': A' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
g': A' ⟦ b', c' ⟧
ff: w -->[ f] x
ff': w' -->[ f'] x'
gg: x -->[ g] y
gg': x' -->[ g'] y'
transportb
  (mor_disp (make_dirprod (G a w) (G' a' w'))
     (make_dirprod (G c y) (G' c' y')))
  (functor_comp (pair_functor F F') (f,, f') (g,, g'))
  (make_dirprod (♯ G ff ;; ♯ G gg)
     (♯ G' ff' ;; ♯ G' gg')) = ?b
 apply disp_binprod_transportf. 
A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A
D': disp_cat A'
E: disp_cat C
E': disp_cat C'
G: disp_functor F D E
G': disp_functor F' D' E'
a: A
a': A'
b: A
b': A'
c: A
c': A'
w: D a
w': D' a'
x: D b
x': D' b'
y: D c
y': D' c'
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': A' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
g': A' ⟦ b', c' ⟧
ff: w -->[ f] x
ff': w' -->[ f'] x'
gg: x -->[ g] y
gg': x' -->[ g'] y'
transportf (mor_disp (G a w) (G c y))
  (maponpaths pr1
     (! functor_comp (pair_functor F F') (f,, f')
          (g,, g'))) (♯ G ff ;; ♯ G gg),,
transportf (mor_disp (G' a' w') (G' c' y'))
  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
     (! functor_comp (pair_functor F F') (f,, f')
          (g,, g'))) (♯ G' ff' ;; ♯ G' gg') =
make_dirprod (♯ G (ff ;; gg)) (♯ G' (ff' ;; gg'))

F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A
D': disp_cat A'
E: disp_cat C
E': disp_cat C'
G: disp_functor F D E
G': disp_functor F' D' E'

a': A'

c': A'

y: D c

g': A' ⟦ b', c' ⟧
ff: w -->[ f] x
ff': w' -->[ f'] x'
gg: x -->[ g] y
gg': x' -->[ g'] y'
make_dirprod (♯ G (ff ;; gg)) (♯ G' (ff' ;; gg')) =
transportf (mor_disp (G a w) (G c y))
  (maponpaths pr1
     (! functor_comp (pair_functor F F') (f,, f')
          (g,, g'))) (♯ G ff ;; ♯ G gg),,
transportf (mor_disp (G' a' w') (G' c' y'))
  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
     (! functor_comp (pair_functor F F') (f,, f')
          (g,, g'))) (♯ G' ff' ;; ♯ G' gg')

ff': w' -->[ f'] x'

♯ G (ff ;; gg) = ?b
A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A
D': disp_cat A'
E: disp_cat C
E': disp_cat C'
G: disp_functor F D E
G': disp_functor F' D' E'
a: A
a': A'
b: A
b': A'
c: A
c': A'
w: D a
w': D' a'
x: D b

y: D c

g': A' ⟦ b', c' ⟧
ff: w -->[ f] x
ff': w' -->[ f'] x'
gg: x -->[ g] y
gg': x' -->[ g'] y'
?b =
transportf (mor_disp (G a w) (G c y))
  (maponpaths pr1
     (! functor_comp (pair_functor F F') (f,, f')
          (g,, g'))) (♯ G ff ;; ♯ G gg)
 
A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A
D': disp_cat A'
E: disp_cat C
E': disp_cat C'
G: disp_functor F D E
G': disp_functor F' D' E'
a: A
a': A'
b: A
b': A'
c: A
c': A'
w: D a
w': D' a'
x: D b
x': D' b'
y: D c
y': D' c'
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': A' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
g': A' ⟦ b', c' ⟧
ff: w -->[ f] x
ff': w' -->[ f'] x'
gg: x -->[ g] y
gg': x' -->[ g'] y'
transportb (mor_disp (G a w) (G c y))
  (functor_comp F f g) (♯ G ff ;; ♯ G gg) =
transportf (mor_disp (G a w) (G c y))
  (maponpaths pr1
     (! functor_comp (pair_functor F F') (f,, f')
          (g,, g'))) (♯ G ff ;; ♯ G gg)

        
A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A
D': disp_cat A'
E: disp_cat C
E': disp_cat C'
G: disp_functor F D E
G': disp_functor F' D' E'
a: A
a': A'
b: A
b': A'
c: A
c': A'
w: D a
w': D' a'
x: D b
x': D' b'
y: D c
y': D' c'
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': A' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
g': A' ⟦ b', c' ⟧
ff: w -->[ f] x
ff': w' -->[ f'] x'
gg: x -->[ g] y
gg': x' -->[ g'] y'
! functor_comp F f g =
maponpaths pr1
  (! functor_comp (pair_functor F F') (f,, f')
       (g,, g'))
 apply C.
      
A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A
D': disp_cat A'
E: disp_cat C
E': disp_cat C'

♯ G' (ff' ;; gg') =
transportf (mor_disp (G' a' w') (G' c' y'))

     (! functor_comp (pair_functor F F') (f,, f')
          (g,, g'))) (♯ G' ff' ;; ♯ G' gg')
 
A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'

w': D' a'

ff: w -->[ f] x
ff': w' -->[ f'] x'
gg: x -->[ g] y
gg': x' -->[ g'] y'
♯ G' (ff' ;; gg') = ?b
A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A
D': disp_cat A'
E: disp_cat C
E': disp_cat C'
G: disp_functor F D E
G': disp_functor F' D' E'
a: A
a': A'
b: A
b': A'
c: A
c': A'
w: D a
w': D' a'
x: D b
x': D' b'
y: D c
y': D' c'
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': A' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
g': A' ⟦ b', c' ⟧
ff: w -->[ f] x
ff': w' -->[ f'] x'
gg: x -->[ g] y
gg': x' -->[ g'] y'
?b =
transportf (mor_disp (G' a' w') (G' c' y'))
  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
     (! functor_comp (pair_functor F F') (f,, f')
          (g,, g'))) (♯ G' ff' ;; ♯ G' gg')
 
A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A
D': disp_cat A'
E: disp_cat C
E': disp_cat C'
G: disp_functor F D E
G': disp_functor F' D' E'
a: A
a': A'
b: A
b': A'
c: A
c': A'
w: D a
w': D' a'
x: D b
x': D' b'
y: D c
y': D' c'
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': A' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
g': A' ⟦ b', c' ⟧
ff: w -->[ f] x
ff': w' -->[ f'] x'
gg: x -->[ g] y
gg': x' -->[ g'] y'
transportb (mor_disp (G' a' w') (G' c' y'))
  (functor_comp F' f' g') (♯ G' ff' ;; ♯ G' gg') =
transportf (mor_disp (G' a' w') (G' c' y'))
  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
     (! functor_comp (pair_functor F F') (f,, f')
          (g,, g'))) (♯ G' ff' ;; ♯ G' gg')

        
A, A', C, C': category
F: A ⟶ C
F': A' ⟶ C'
D: disp_cat A
D': disp_cat A'
E: disp_cat C
E': disp_cat C'
G: disp_functor F D E
G': disp_functor F' D' E'
a: A
a': A'
b: A
b': A'
c: A
c': A'
w: D a
w': D' a'
x: D b
x': D' b'
y: D c
y': D' c'
f: A ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': A' ⟦ a', b' ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, c ⟧
g': A' ⟦ b', c' ⟧
ff: w -->[ f] x
ff': w' -->[ f'] x'
gg: x -->[ g] y
gg': x' -->[ g'] y'
! functor_comp F' f' g' =
maponpaths dirprod_pr2
  (! functor_comp (pair_functor F F') (f,, f')
       (g,, g'))
 apply C'.
  Qed.

  Definition disp_pair_functor :
    @disp_functor (A ⊠ A') (C ⊠ C')  (pair_functor F F') (D ⊠⊠ D') (E ⊠⊠ E')
    :=  disp_pair_functor_data ,, disp_pair_functor_axioms.

End DispCartProdOfFunctors.

Section DispAssocFunctors.

  Context (A B C : category)
          (DA : disp_cat A)
          (DB : disp_cat B)
          (DC : disp_cat C).

  
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
disp_functor_data (precategory_binproduct_assoc A B C)
  (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC)

  
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
disp_functor_data (precategory_binproduct_assoc A B C)
  (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC)

    
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
∏ x : A ⊠ (B ⊠ C),
(DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) x
→ ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC)
    (precategory_binproduct_assoc A B C x)
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
(λ Fob : ∏ x : A ⊠ (B ⊠ C),
         (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) x
         → ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC)
             (precategory_binproduct_assoc A B C x),
 ∏ (x y : A ⊠ (B ⊠ C)) (xx : (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) x)
 (yy : (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) y)
 (f : A ⊠ (B ⊠ C) ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 xx -->[ f] yy
 → Fob x xx -->[
   (# (precategory_binproduct_assoc A B C))%cat f] 
   Fob y yy) ?pr1

    
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
∏ x : A ⊠ (B ⊠ C),
(DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) x
→ ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC)
    (precategory_binproduct_assoc A B C x)
 
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
abc: A ⊠ (B ⊠ C)
dabc: (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) abc
((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC)
  (precategory_binproduct_assoc A B C abc)

      exact ( (pr1 dabc,,pr12 dabc) ,, pr22 dabc).
    
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
(λ Fob : ∏ x : A ⊠ (B ⊠ C),
         (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) x
         → ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC)
             (precategory_binproduct_assoc A B C x),
 ∏ (x y : A ⊠ (B ⊠ C)) (xx : (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) x)
 (yy : (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) y)
 (f : A ⊠ (B ⊠ C) ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 xx -->[ f] yy
 → Fob x xx -->[
   (# (precategory_binproduct_assoc A B C))%cat f] 
   Fob y yy)
  (λ (abc : A ⊠ (B ⊠ C))
   (dabc : (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) abc),
   (pr1 dabc,, pr12 dabc),, pr22 dabc)
 
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
abc, abc': A ⊠ (B ⊠ C)
xx: (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) abc
yy: (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) abc'
f: A ⊠ (B ⊠ C) ⟦ abc, abc' ⟧
g: xx -->[ f] yy
((pr1 xx,, pr12 xx),, pr22 xx) -->[
(# (precategory_binproduct_assoc A B C))%cat f] ((pr1
                                                 yy,,
                                                 pr12 yy),,
                                                 pr22 yy)

      exact ( (pr1 g,,pr12 g) ,, pr22 g).
  Defined.

  (* Make a general lemma that encompasses the two parts here *)
  
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
disp_functor_axioms disp_assoc_data

  
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
disp_functor_axioms disp_assoc_data

    
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
∏ (x : A ⊠ (B ⊠ C)) (xx : (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) x),
♯ disp_assoc_data (id_disp xx) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (disp_assoc_data x xx)
     (disp_assoc_data x xx))
  (functor_id (precategory_binproduct_assoc A B C) x)
  (id_disp (disp_assoc_data x xx))
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
∏ (x y z : A ⊠ (B ⊠ C)) (xx : (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) x)
(yy : pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) y)
(zz : pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) z)
(f : A ⊠ (B ⊠ C) ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : A ⊠ (B ⊠ C) ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ disp_assoc_data (ff ;; gg) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (disp_assoc_data x xx)
     (disp_assoc_data z zz))
  (functor_comp (precategory_binproduct_assoc A B C) f
     g) (♯ disp_assoc_data ff ;; ♯ disp_assoc_data gg)

    
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
∏ (x : A ⊠ (B ⊠ C)) (xx : (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) x),
♯ disp_assoc_data (id_disp xx) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (disp_assoc_data x xx)
     (disp_assoc_data x xx))
  (functor_id (precategory_binproduct_assoc A B C) x)
  (id_disp (disp_assoc_data x xx))
 
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
x: A ⊠ (B ⊠ C)
xx: (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) x
♯ disp_assoc_data (id_disp xx) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (disp_assoc_data x xx)
     (disp_assoc_data x xx))
  (functor_id (precategory_binproduct_assoc A B C) x)
  (id_disp (disp_assoc_data x xx))

      
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
x: A ⊠ (B ⊠ C)
xx: (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) x
(id_disp (pr1 xx),, id_disp (pr12 xx)),,
id_disp (pr22 xx) =
transportb
  (mor_disp ((pr1 xx,, pr12 xx),, pr22 xx)
     ((pr1 xx,, pr12 xx),, pr22 xx))
  (functor_id (precategory_binproduct_assoc A B C) x)
  (make_dirprod
     (make_dirprod (id_disp (pr1 xx))
        (id_disp (pr12 xx))) (id_disp (pr22 xx)))

      
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
x: A ⊠ (B ⊠ C)
xx: (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) x
pr1
  ((id_disp (pr1 xx),, id_disp (pr12 xx)),,
   id_disp (pr22 xx)) =
pr1
  (transportb
     (mor_disp ((pr1 xx,, pr12 xx),, pr22 xx)
        ((pr1 xx,, pr12 xx),, pr22 xx))
     (functor_id (precategory_binproduct_assoc A B C)
        x)
     (make_dirprod
        (make_dirprod (id_disp (pr1 xx))
           (id_disp (pr12 xx))) (id_disp (pr22 xx))))

DC: disp_cat C

xx: (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) x
pr2
  ((id_disp (pr1 xx),, id_disp (pr12 xx)),,
   id_disp (pr22 xx)) =
pr2
  (transportb
     (mor_disp ((pr1 xx,, pr12 xx),, pr22 xx)
        ((pr1 xx,, pr12 xx),, pr22 xx))
     (functor_id (precategory_binproduct_assoc A B C)
        x)
     (make_dirprod
        (make_dirprod (id_disp (pr1 xx))
           (id_disp (pr12 xx))) (id_disp (pr22 xx))))

pr1 (id_disp (pr1 xx),, id_disp (pr12 xx)) =
pr11 (transportb
        (mor_disp ((pr1 xx,, pr12 xx),, pr22 xx)
           ((pr1 xx,, pr12 xx),, pr22 xx))

           (precategory_binproduct_assoc A B C) x)

?t1 =
pr1
  (transportb
     (mor_disp ((pr1 xx,, pr12 xx),, pr22 xx)
        ((pr1 xx,, pr12 xx),, pr22 xx))

                apply (disp_binprod_transportf_pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC). 
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
x: A ⊠ (B ⊠ C)
xx: (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) x
id_disp (pr1 xx) =
pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (pr1 xx,, pr12 xx) (pr1 xx,, pr12 xx))
     (maponpaths pr1
        (! functor_id
             (precategory_binproduct_assoc A B C) x))
     (make_dirprod (id_disp (pr1 xx))
        (id_disp (pr12 xx))))

A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
x: A ⊠ (B ⊠ C)
xx: (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) x
id_disp (pr1 xx) =
transportf (mor_disp (pr1 xx) (pr1 xx))
  (maponpaths pr1
     (maponpaths pr1
        (! functor_id
             (precategory_binproduct_assoc A B C) x)))
  (id_disp (pr1 xx))

x: A ⊠ (B ⊠ C)
xx: (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) x
transportf (mor_disp (pr1 xx) (pr1 xx))
  (maponpaths pr1
     (maponpaths pr1
        (! functor_id
             (precategory_binproduct_assoc A B C) x)))
  (id_disp (pr1 xx)) = id_disp (pr1 xx)

xx: (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) x
isaset
  (A ⟦ pr1 (pr1 x, pr12 x), pr1 (pr1 x, pr12 x) ⟧)

          apply A.

DB: disp_cat B

?b =
pr2
  (transportb
     (mor_disp ((pr1 xx,, pr12 xx),, pr22 xx)
        ((pr1 xx,, pr12 xx),, pr22 xx))
     (functor_id (precategory_binproduct_assoc A B C)
        x)

        (make_dirprod (id_disp (pr1 xx))
           (id_disp (pr12 xx))) (id_disp (pr22 xx))))

id_disp (pr22 xx) =

  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
     (! functor_id
          (precategory_binproduct_assoc A B C) x))
  (id_disp (pr22 xx))

A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
∏ (x y z : A ⊠ (B ⊠ C)) (xx : (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) x)
(yy : pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) y)
(zz : pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) z)
(f : A ⊠ (B ⊠ C) ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : A ⊠ (B ⊠ C) ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ disp_assoc_data (ff ;; gg) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (disp_assoc_data x xx)
     (disp_assoc_data z zz))
  (functor_comp (precategory_binproduct_assoc A B C) f
     g) (♯ disp_assoc_data ff ;; ♯ disp_assoc_data gg)

ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
pr12 ff ;; pr12 gg =
pr21 (transportb
        (mor_disp ((pr1 xx,, pr12 xx),, pr22 xx)
           ((pr1 zz,, pr12 zz),, pr22 zz))
        (functor_comp
           (precategory_binproduct_assoc A B C) f g)
        (make_dirprod
           (make_dirprod (pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg)
              (pr12 ff ;; pr12 gg))
           (pr22 ff ;; pr22 gg)))

          
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
x, y, z: A ⊠ (B ⊠ C)
xx: (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) x
yy: pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) y
zz: pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) z
f: A ⊠ (B ⊠ C) ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⊠ (B ⊠ C) ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
pr12 ff ;; pr12 gg = ?b

           ((pr1 zz,, pr12 zz),, pr22 zz))
        (functor_comp

gg: yy -->[ g] zz
?t1 =
pr1
  (transportb
     (mor_disp ((pr1 xx,, pr12 xx),, pr22 xx)
        ((pr1 zz,, pr12 zz),, pr22 zz))
     (functor_comp
        (precategory_binproduct_assoc A B C) f g)
     (make_dirprod
        (make_dirprod (pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg)
           (pr12 ff ;; pr12 gg)) (pr22 ff ;; pr22 gg)))

                apply (disp_binprod_transportf_pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC). 
A, B, C: category

DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C

yy: pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) y
zz: pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) z
f: A ⊠ (B ⊠ C) ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⊠ (B ⊠ C) ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
pr12 ff ;; pr12 gg =
pr2
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (pr1 xx,, pr12 xx) (pr1 zz,, pr12 zz))
     (maponpaths pr1
        (! functor_comp
             (precategory_binproduct_assoc A B C) f g))
     (make_dirprod (pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg)
        (pr12 ff ;; pr12 gg)))

A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
x, y, z: A ⊠ (B ⊠ C)
xx: (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) x
yy: pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) y
zz: pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) z
f: A ⊠ (B ⊠ C) ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⊠ (B ⊠ C) ⟦ y, z ⟧

gg: yy -->[ g] zz

transportf (mor_disp (pr12 xx) (pr12 zz))
  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
     (maponpaths pr1
        (! functor_comp
             (precategory_binproduct_assoc A B C) f g)))
  (pr12 ff ;; pr12 gg)

          
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
x, y, z: A ⊠ (B ⊠ C)
xx: (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) x
yy: pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) y
zz: pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) z
f: A ⊠ (B ⊠ C) ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⊠ (B ⊠ C) ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf (mor_disp (pr12 xx) (pr12 zz))
  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
     (maponpaths pr1
        (! functor_comp
             (precategory_binproduct_assoc A B C) f g)))
  (pr12 ff ;; pr12 gg) = pr12 ff ;; pr12 gg

          
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
x, y, z: A ⊠ (B ⊠ C)

yy: pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) y
zz: pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) z
f: A ⊠ (B ⊠ C) ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⊠ (B ⊠ C) ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
isaset
  (B ⟦ pr2 (pr1 x, pr12 x), pr2 (pr1 z, pr12 z) ⟧)

          apply B.
      
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
x, y, z: A ⊠ (B ⊠ C)

zz: pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) z

g: A ⊠ (B ⊠ C) ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
pr2
  ((pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg,, pr12 ff ;; pr12 gg),,
   pr22 ff ;; pr22 gg) =
pr2
  (transportb
     (mor_disp ((pr1 xx,, pr12 xx),, pr22 xx)
        ((pr1 zz,, pr12 zz),, pr22 zz))
     (functor_comp
        (precategory_binproduct_assoc A B C) f g)
     (make_dirprod
        (make_dirprod (pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg)
           (pr12 ff ;; pr12 gg)) (pr22 ff ;; pr22 gg)))

zz: pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) z

g: A ⊠ (B ⊠ C) ⟦ y, z ⟧

  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2

A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
x, y, z: A ⊠ (B ⊠ C)
xx: (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) x
yy: pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) y
zz: pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) z
f: A ⊠ (B ⊠ C) ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: A ⊠ (B ⊠ C) ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
isaset
  (C ⟦ pr2 (pr1 x,, pr12 x, pr22 x),
   pr2 (pr1 z,, pr12 z, pr22 z) ⟧)

        apply C.
  Qed.

  Definition disp_assoc
    : disp_functor (precategory_binproduct_assoc A B C)
                   (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC)
    := _ ,, disp_assoc_axioms.


  
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
disp_functor_data
  (precategory_binproduct_unassoc A B C)
  ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC))

  
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
disp_functor_data
  (precategory_binproduct_unassoc A B C)
  ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC))

    
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
∏ x : (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C,
((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) x
→ (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC))
    (precategory_binproduct_unassoc A B C x)
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
(λ Fob : ∏ x : (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C,
         ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) x
         → (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC))
             (precategory_binproduct_unassoc A B C x),
 ∏ (x y : (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C) (xx : ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) x)
 (yy : ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) y)
 (f : (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 xx -->[ f] yy
 → Fob x xx -->[
   (# (precategory_binproduct_unassoc A B C))%cat f] 
   Fob y yy) ?pr1

    
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
∏ x : (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C,
((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) x
→ (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC))
    (precategory_binproduct_unassoc A B C x)
 
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
abc: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C
dabc: ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) abc
(DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC))
  (precategory_binproduct_unassoc A B C abc)

      exact ( pr11 dabc,, (pr21 dabc ,, pr2 dabc)).
    
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
(λ Fob : ∏ x : (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C,
         ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) x
         → (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC))
             (precategory_binproduct_unassoc A B C x),
 ∏ (x y : (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C) (xx : ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) x)
 (yy : ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) y)
 (f : (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧),
 xx -->[ f] yy
 → Fob x xx -->[
   (# (precategory_binproduct_unassoc A B C))%cat f] 
   Fob y yy)
  (λ (abc : (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C)
   (dabc : ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) abc),
   pr11 dabc,, pr21 dabc,, pr2 dabc)
 
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
abc, abc': (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C
xx: ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) abc
yy: ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) abc'
f: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ abc, abc' ⟧
g: xx -->[ f] yy
(pr11 xx,, pr21 xx,, pr2 xx) -->[
(# (precategory_binproduct_unassoc A B C))%cat f] 
(pr11 yy,, pr21 yy,, pr2 yy)

      exact ( pr11 g,, (pr21 g ,, pr2 g)).
  Defined.

  (* Make a general lemma that encompasses the two parts here *)
  
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
disp_functor_axioms disp_unassoc_data

  
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
disp_functor_axioms disp_unassoc_data

    
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
∏ (x : (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C) (xx : ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) x),
♯ disp_unassoc_data (id_disp xx) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (disp_unassoc_data x xx)
     (disp_unassoc_data x xx))
  (functor_id (precategory_binproduct_unassoc A B C) x)
  (id_disp (disp_unassoc_data x xx))
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
∏ (x y z : (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C) (xx : ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) x)
(yy : pr1 ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) y)
(zz : pr1 ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) z)
(f : (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ disp_unassoc_data (ff ;; gg) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (disp_unassoc_data x xx)
     (disp_unassoc_data z zz))
  (functor_comp (precategory_binproduct_unassoc A B C)
     f g)
  (♯ disp_unassoc_data ff ;; ♯ disp_unassoc_data gg)

    
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
∏ (x : (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C) (xx : ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) x),
♯ disp_unassoc_data (id_disp xx) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (disp_unassoc_data x xx)
     (disp_unassoc_data x xx))
  (functor_id (precategory_binproduct_unassoc A B C) x)
  (id_disp (disp_unassoc_data x xx))
 
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
x: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C
xx: ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) x
♯ disp_unassoc_data (id_disp xx) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (disp_unassoc_data x xx)
     (disp_unassoc_data x xx))
  (functor_id (precategory_binproduct_unassoc A B C) x)
  (id_disp (disp_unassoc_data x xx))

      
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
x: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C
xx: ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) x
id_disp (pr11 xx),,
id_disp (pr21 xx),, id_disp (pr2 xx) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (pr11 xx,, pr21 xx,, pr2 xx)
     (pr11 xx,, pr21 xx,, pr2 xx))
  (functor_id (precategory_binproduct_unassoc A B C) x)
  (make_dirprod (id_disp (pr11 xx))
     (make_dirprod (id_disp (pr21 xx))
        (id_disp (pr2 xx))))

      
A, B, C: category

DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
x: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C
xx: ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) x
pr1
  (id_disp (pr11 xx),,
   id_disp (pr21 xx),, id_disp (pr2 xx)) =
pr1
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (pr11 xx,, pr21 xx,, pr2 xx)
        (pr11 xx,, pr21 xx,, pr2 xx))
     (functor_id
        (precategory_binproduct_unassoc A B C) x)
     (make_dirprod (id_disp (pr11 xx))
        (make_dirprod (id_disp (pr21 xx))
           (id_disp (pr2 xx)))))

?b =
pr1

     (mor_disp (pr11 xx,, pr21 xx,, pr2 xx)
        (pr11 xx,, pr21 xx,, pr2 xx))
     (functor_id
        (precategory_binproduct_unassoc A B C) x)
     (make_dirprod (id_disp (pr11 xx))
        (make_dirprod (id_disp (pr21 xx))
           (id_disp (pr2 xx)))))
 apply (disp_binprod_transportf_pr1 DA (DB ⊠⊠ DC)). 
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
x: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C
xx: ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) x
id_disp (pr11 xx) =
transportf (mor_disp (pr11 xx) (pr11 xx))
  (maponpaths pr1
     (! functor_id
          (precategory_binproduct_unassoc A B C) x))
  (id_disp (pr11 xx))

        
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
x: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C
xx: ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) x
transportf (mor_disp (pr11 xx) (pr11 xx))
  (maponpaths pr1
     (! functor_id
          (precategory_binproduct_unassoc A B C) x))
  (id_disp (pr11 xx)) = id_disp (pr11 xx)

        
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
x: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C
xx: ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) x
isaset
  (A ⟦ pr1 (pr11 x, pr21 x,, pr2 x),
   pr1 (pr11 x, pr21 x,, pr2 x) ⟧)

        apply A.

A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
x: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C
xx: ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) x
id_disp (pr21 xx) =
pr1
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (pr21 xx,, pr2 xx) (pr21 xx,, pr2 xx))
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (! functor_id
             (precategory_binproduct_unassoc A B C) x))
     (make_dirprod (id_disp (pr21 xx))
        (id_disp (pr2 xx))))

          apply B.

DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
x: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C
xx: ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) x

transportf (mor_disp (pr2 xx) (pr2 xx))
  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (! functor_id

  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2

  (id_disp (pr2 xx)) = id_disp (pr2 xx)

          
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
x: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C
xx: ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) x
isaset
  (C ⟦ pr2 (pr21 x, pr2 x), pr2 (pr21 x, pr2 x) ⟧)

          apply C.
    
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
∏ (x y z : (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C) (xx : ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) x)
(yy : pr1 ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) y)
(zz : pr1 ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) z)
(f : (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ disp_unassoc_data (ff ;; gg) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (disp_unassoc_data x xx)
     (disp_unassoc_data z zz))
  (functor_comp (precategory_binproduct_unassoc A B C)
     f g)
  (♯ disp_unassoc_data ff ;; ♯ disp_unassoc_data gg)
 
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
x, y, z: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C
xx: ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) x
yy: pr1 ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) y
zz: pr1 ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) z
f: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
♯ disp_unassoc_data (ff ;; gg) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (disp_unassoc_data x xx)
     (disp_unassoc_data z zz))
  (functor_comp (precategory_binproduct_unassoc A B C)
     f g)
  (♯ disp_unassoc_data ff ;; ♯ disp_unassoc_data gg)

      
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
x, y, z: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C
xx: ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) x
yy: pr1 ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) y
zz: pr1 ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) z
f: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
pr11 ff ;; pr11 gg,,
pr21 ff ;; pr21 gg,, pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg =
transportb
  (mor_disp (pr11 xx,, pr21 xx,, pr2 xx)
     (pr11 zz,, pr21 zz,, pr2 zz))
  (functor_comp (precategory_binproduct_unassoc A B C)
     f g)
  (make_dirprod (pr11 ff ;; pr11 gg)
     (make_dirprod (pr21 ff ;; pr21 gg)
        (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg)))

      
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
x, y, z: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C
xx: ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) x
yy: pr1 ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) y
zz: pr1 ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) z
f: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
pr1
  (pr11 ff ;; pr11 gg,,
   pr21 ff ;; pr21 gg,, pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg) =
pr1
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (pr11 xx,, pr21 xx,, pr2 xx)
        (pr11 zz,, pr21 zz,, pr2 zz))
     (functor_comp
        (precategory_binproduct_unassoc A B C) f g)
     (make_dirprod (pr11 ff ;; pr11 gg)
        (make_dirprod (pr21 ff ;; pr21 gg)
           (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg))))

zz: pr1 ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) z
f: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
pr2
  (pr11 ff ;; pr11 gg,,
   pr21 ff ;; pr21 gg,, pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg) =
pr2

     (mor_disp (pr11 xx,, pr21 xx,, pr2 xx)
        (pr11 zz,, pr21 zz,, pr2 zz))

A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
x, y, z: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C
xx: ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) x
yy: pr1 ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) y
zz: pr1 ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) z
f: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
pr11 ff ;; pr11 gg =
transportf (mor_disp (pr11 xx) (pr11 zz))
  (maponpaths pr1
     (! functor_comp
          (precategory_binproduct_unassoc A B C) f g))
  (pr11 ff ;; pr11 gg)

        
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
x, y, z: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C

yy: pr1 ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) y
zz: pr1 ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) z

g: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf (mor_disp (pr11 xx) (pr11 zz))
  (maponpaths pr1
     (! functor_comp
          (precategory_binproduct_unassoc A B C) f g))
  (pr11 ff ;; pr11 gg) = pr11 ff ;; pr11 gg

        
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C

yy: pr1 ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) y
zz: pr1 ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) z
f: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
isaset
  (A ⟦ pr1 (pr11 x, pr21 x,, pr2 x),
   pr1 (pr11 z, pr21 z,, pr2 z) ⟧)

        apply A.

  (transportf
     (mor_disp (pr21 xx,, pr2 xx) (pr21 zz,, pr2 zz))
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (! functor_comp
             (precategory_binproduct_unassoc A B C) f
             g))
     (make_dirprod (pr21 ff ;; pr21 gg)
        (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg)))

gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf (mor_disp (pr21 xx) (pr21 zz))
  (maponpaths pr1
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (! functor_comp
             (precategory_binproduct_unassoc A B C) f
             g))) (pr21 ff ;; pr21 gg) =
pr21 ff ;; pr21 gg

          
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
x, y, z: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C
xx: ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) x
yy: pr1 ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) y
zz: pr1 ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) z
f: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
isaset
  (B ⟦ pr1 (pr21 x, pr2 x), pr1 (pr21 z, pr2 z) ⟧)

          apply B.
        
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
x, y, z: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C
xx: ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) x
yy: pr1 ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) y
zz: pr1 ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) z
f: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
pr2 (pr21 ff ;; pr21 gg,, pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg) =
pr22 (transportb
        (mor_disp (pr11 xx,, pr21 xx,, pr2 xx)
           (pr11 zz,, pr21 zz,, pr2 zz))
        (functor_comp
           (precategory_binproduct_unassoc A B C) f g)
        (make_dirprod (pr11 ff ;; pr11 gg)
           (make_dirprod (pr21 ff ;; pr21 gg)
              (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg))))
 
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
x, y, z: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C
xx: ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) x
yy: pr1 ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) y
zz: pr1 ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) z
f: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg =
pr22 (transportb
        (mor_disp (pr11 xx,, pr21 xx,, pr2 xx)
           (pr11 zz,, pr21 zz,, pr2 zz))
        (functor_comp
           (precategory_binproduct_unassoc A B C) f g)
        (make_dirprod (pr11 ff ;; pr11 gg)
           (make_dirprod (pr21 ff ;; pr21 gg)
              (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg))))

          
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
x, y, z: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C
xx: ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) x
yy: pr1 ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) y
zz: pr1 ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) z
f: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg = ?b
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
x, y, z: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C
xx: ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) x
yy: pr1 ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) y
zz: pr1 ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) z
f: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
?b =
pr22 (transportb
        (mor_disp (pr11 xx,, pr21 xx,, pr2 xx)
           (pr11 zz,, pr21 zz,, pr2 zz))
        (functor_comp
           (precategory_binproduct_unassoc A B C) f g)
        (make_dirprod (pr11 ff ;; pr11 gg)
           (make_dirprod (pr21 ff ;; pr21 gg)
              (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg))))

          
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
x, y, z: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C
xx: ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) x
yy: pr1 ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) y
zz: pr1 ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) z
f: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
?b =
pr22 (transportb
        (mor_disp (pr11 xx,, pr21 xx,, pr2 xx)
           (pr11 zz,, pr21 zz,, pr2 zz))
        (functor_comp
           (precategory_binproduct_unassoc A B C) f g)
        (make_dirprod (pr11 ff ;; pr11 gg)
           (make_dirprod (pr21 ff ;; pr21 gg)
              (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg))))
 
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
x, y, z: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C
xx: ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) x
yy: pr1 ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) y
zz: pr1 ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) z
f: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
?t1 =
pr2
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (pr11 xx,, pr21 xx,, pr2 xx)
        (pr11 zz,, pr21 zz,, pr2 zz))
     (functor_comp
        (precategory_binproduct_unassoc A B C) f g)
     (make_dirprod (pr11 ff ;; pr11 gg)
        (make_dirprod (pr21 ff ;; pr21 gg)
           (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg))))

                apply (disp_binprod_transportf_pr2 DA (DB ⊠⊠ DC)). 
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
x, y, z: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C
xx: ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) x
yy: pr1 ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) y
zz: pr1 ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) z
f: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg =
pr2
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (pr21 xx,, pr2 xx) (pr21 zz,, pr2 zz))
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (! functor_comp
             (precategory_binproduct_unassoc A B C) f
             g))
     (make_dirprod (pr21 ff ;; pr21 gg)
        (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg)))

          
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
x, y, z: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C

yy: pr1 ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) y
zz: pr1 ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) z
