g: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg = ?b
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
x, y, z: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C
xx: ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) x
yy: pr1 ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) y
zz: pr1 ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) z
f: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
?b =
pr2
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (pr21 xx,, pr2 xx) (pr21 zz,, pr2 zz))
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (! functor_comp
             (precategory_binproduct_unassoc A B C) f
             g))
     (make_dirprod (pr21 ff ;; pr21 gg)
        (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg)))

          
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
x, y, z: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C
xx: ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) x
yy: pr1 ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) y
zz: pr1 ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) z
f: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
?b =
pr2
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (pr21 xx,, pr2 xx) (pr21 zz,, pr2 zz))
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (! functor_comp
             (precategory_binproduct_unassoc A B C) f
             g))
     (make_dirprod (pr21 ff ;; pr21 gg)
        (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg)))
 apply (disp_binprod_transportf_pr2 DB DC). 
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
x, y, z: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C
xx: ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) x
yy: pr1 ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) y
zz: pr1 ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) z
f: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg =
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 xx) (pr2 zz))
  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (! functor_comp
             (precategory_binproduct_unassoc A B C) f
             g))) (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg)

          
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
x, y, z: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C
xx: ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) x
yy: pr1 ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) y
zz: pr1 ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) z
f: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportf (mor_disp (pr2 xx) (pr2 zz))
  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (! functor_comp
             (precategory_binproduct_unassoc A B C) f
             g))) (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg) =
pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg

          
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
x, y, z: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C
xx: ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) x
yy: pr1 ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) y
zz: pr1 ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC) z
f: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: (A ⊠ B) ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
isaset
  (C ⟦ pr2 (pr21 x, pr2 x), pr2 (pr21 z, pr2 z) ⟧)

          apply C.
  Qed.

  Definition disp_unassoc
    : disp_functor (precategory_binproduct_assoc A B C)
                   (DA ⊠⊠ (DB ⊠⊠ DC)) ((DA ⊠⊠ DB) ⊠⊠ DC)
    := _ ,, disp_assoc_axioms.


End DispAssocFunctors.




A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
F: A ⊠ B ⟶ C
FF: disp_functor F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC
a₁, a₂: A
da₁: DA a₁
da₂: DA a₂
f, f': A ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
e: f = f'
ff: da₁ -->[ f] da₂
b₁, b₂: B
db₁: DB b₁
db₂: DB b₂
g: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
gg: db₁ -->[ g] db₂
UU


A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
F: A ⊠ B ⟶ C
FF: disp_functor F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC
a₁, a₂: A
da₁: DA a₁
da₂: DA a₂
f, f': A ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
e: f = f'
ff: da₁ -->[ f] da₂
b₁, b₂: B
db₁: DB b₁
db₂: DB b₂
g: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
gg: db₁ -->[ g] db₂
UU

  
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
F: A ⊠ B ⟶ C
FF: disp_functor F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC
a₁, a₂: A
da₁: DA a₁
da₂: DA a₂
f, f': A ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
e: f = f'
ff: da₁ -->[ f] da₂
b₁, b₂: B
db₁: DB b₁
db₂: DB b₂
g: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
gg: db₁ -->[ g] db₂
FF (a₁,, b₁) (da₁,, db₁) -->[
(# F)%cat (f',, g)] FF (a₂,, b₂) (da₂,, db₂)

  
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
F: A ⊠ B ⟶ C
FF: disp_functor F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC
a₁, a₂: A
da₁: DA a₁
da₂: DA a₂
f, f': A ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
e: f = f'
ff: da₁ -->[ f] da₂
b₁, b₂: B
db₁: DB b₁
db₂: DB b₂
g: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
gg: db₁ -->[ g] db₂
X:= ♯ FF (ff,, gg): FF (a₁,, b₁) (da₁,, db₁) -->[
(# F)%cat (f,, g)] FF (a₂,, b₂) (da₂,, db₂)
FF (a₁,, b₁) (da₁,, db₁) -->[
(# F)%cat (f',, g)] FF (a₂,, b₂) (da₂,, db₂)

  
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
F: A ⊠ B ⟶ C
FF: disp_functor F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC
a₁, a₂: A
da₁: DA a₁
da₂: DA a₂
f, f': A ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
e: f = f'
ff: da₁ -->[ f] da₂
b₁, b₂: B
db₁: DB b₁
db₂: DB b₂
g: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
gg: db₁ -->[ g] db₂
X:= ♯ FF (ff,, gg): FF (a₁,, b₁) (da₁,, db₁) -->[
(# F)%cat (f,, g)] FF (a₂,, b₂) (da₂,, db₂)
(# F)%cat (f,, g) = (# F)%cat (f',, g)

  
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
F: A ⊠ B ⟶ C
FF: disp_functor F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC
a₁, a₂: A
da₁: DA a₁
da₂: DA a₂
f, f': A ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
e: f = f'
ff: da₁ -->[ f] da₂
b₁, b₂: B
db₁: DB b₁
db₂: DB b₂
g: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
gg: db₁ -->[ g] db₂
X:= ♯ FF (ff,, gg): FF (a₁,, b₁) (da₁,, db₁) -->[
(# F)%cat (f,, g)] FF (a₂,, b₂) (da₂,, db₂)
f,, g = f',, g

  
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
F: A ⊠ B ⟶ C
FF: disp_functor F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC
a₁, a₂: A
da₁: DA a₁
da₂: DA a₂
f, f': A ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
e: f = f'
ff: da₁ -->[ f] da₂
b₁, b₂: B
db₁: DB b₁
db₂: DB b₂
g: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
gg: db₁ -->[ g] db₂
X:= ♯ FF (ff,, gg): FF (a₁,, b₁) (da₁,, db₁) -->[
(# F)%cat (f,, g)] FF (a₂,, b₂) (da₂,, db₂)
f = f'

  apply e.
Defined.


A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
F: A ⊠ B ⟶ C
FF: disp_functor F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC
a₁, a₂: A
da₁: DA a₁
da₂: DA a₂
f, f': A ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
e: f = f'
ff: da₁ -->[ f] da₂
b₁, b₂: B
db₁: DB b₁
db₂: DB b₂
g: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
gg: db₁ -->[ g] db₂
transportf_fst_arg_type FF e ff gg


A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
F: A ⊠ B ⟶ C
FF: disp_functor F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC
a₁, a₂: A
da₁: DA a₁
da₂: DA a₂
f, f': A ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
e: f = f'
ff: da₁ -->[ f] da₂
b₁, b₂: B
db₁: DB b₁
db₂: DB b₂
g: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
gg: db₁ -->[ g] db₂
transportf_fst_arg_type FF e ff gg

  
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
F: A ⊠ B ⟶ C
FF: disp_functor F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC
a₁, a₂: A
da₁: DA a₁
da₂: DA a₂
f, f': A ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
e: f = f'
ff: da₁ -->[ f] da₂
b₁, b₂: B
db₁: DB b₁
db₂: DB b₂
g: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
gg: db₁ -->[ g] db₂
♯ FF
  (make_dirprod (transportf (mor_disp da₁ da₂) e ff)
     gg) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF (a₁,, b₁) (da₁,, db₁))
     (FF (a₂,, b₂) (da₂,, db₂)))
  (maponpaths (# F)%cat
     (maponpaths_2
        (tpair (λ _ : A ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧, B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧)) e g))
  (♯ FF (ff,, gg))

  
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
F: A ⊠ B ⟶ C
FF: disp_functor F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC
a₁, a₂: A
da₁: DA a₁
da₂: DA a₂
f: A ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
ff: da₁ -->[ f] da₂
b₁, b₂: B
db₁: DB b₁
db₂: DB b₂
g: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
gg: db₁ -->[ g] db₂
♯ FF
  (make_dirprod
     (transportf (mor_disp da₁ da₂) (idpath f) ff) gg) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF (a₁,, b₁) (da₁,, db₁))
     (FF (a₂,, b₂) (da₂,, db₂)))
  (maponpaths (# F)%cat
     (maponpaths_2
        (tpair (λ _ : A ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧, B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧))
        (idpath f) g)) (♯ FF (ff,, gg))

  
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
F: A ⊠ B ⟶ C
FF: disp_functor F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC
a₁, a₂: A
da₁: DA a₁
da₂: DA a₂
f: A ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
ff: da₁ -->[ f] da₂
b₁, b₂: B
db₁: DB b₁
db₂: DB b₂
g: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
gg: db₁ -->[ g] db₂
♯ FF (make_dirprod ff gg) = ♯ FF (ff,, gg)

  apply idpath.
Qed.


Section disp_fix_fst_arg.

  Local Notation "( f #, g )" := (catbinprodmor f g).

  Context {A B C : category}
          {DA : disp_cat A}
          {DB : disp_cat B}
          {DC : disp_cat C}
          (F : functor (A ⊠ B) C)
          (FF : disp_functor F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC)
          (a : A)
          (da : DA a).


  Definition disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob {b : B} (db : DB b) : DC (F _) := FF (a,,b) (da,, db).

  
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
F: A ⊠ B ⟶ C
FF: disp_functor F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC
a: A
da: DA a
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
db₁: DB b₁
db₂: DB b₂
ff: db₁ -->[ f] db₂
FF (a,, b₁) (da,, db₁) -->[
(# F)%cat (id a #, f)] FF (a,, b₂) (da,, db₂)

  
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
F: A ⊠ B ⟶ C
FF: disp_functor F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC
a: A
da: DA a
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
db₁: DB b₁
db₂: DB b₂
ff: db₁ -->[ f] db₂
FF (a,, b₁) (da,, db₁) -->[
(# F)%cat (id a #, f)] FF (a,, b₂) (da,, db₂)

    
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
F: A ⊠ B ⟶ C
FF: disp_functor F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC
a: A
da: DA a
b₁, b₂: B
f: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
db₁: DB b₁
db₂: DB b₂
ff: db₁ -->[ f] db₂
(da,, db₁) -->[ (id a #, f)] (da,, db₂)

    apply (id_disp _ ,, ff).
  Defined.

DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
F: A ⊠ B ⟶ C
FF: disp_functor F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC
a: A
da: DA a
disp_functor_data (functor_fix_fst_arg A B C F a) DB
  DC

DC: disp_cat C
F: A ⊠ B ⟶ C
FF: disp_functor F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC
a: A
da: DA a
∏ (x y : B) (xx : DB x) (yy : DB y) (f : B ⟦ x, y ⟧),
xx -->[ f] yy
→ disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob xx -->[
  (# (functor_fix_fst_arg A B C F a))%cat f] disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob
                                               yy

ff: xx -->[ f] yy
disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob xx -->[
(# (functor_fix_fst_arg A B C F a))%cat f] disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob
                                             yy

xx -->[ f] yy

    apply ff.
  Defined.

A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
F: A ⊠ B ⟶ C
FF: disp_functor F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC
a: A
da: DA a
∏ (x : B) (xx : DB x),
♯ disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_data (id_disp xx) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_data x xx)
     (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_data x xx))
  (functor_id (functor_fix_fst_arg A B C F a) x)
  (id_disp (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_data x xx))
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
F: A ⊠ B ⟶ C
FF: disp_functor F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC
a: A
da: DA a
∏ (x y z : B) (xx : DB x) (yy : pr1 DB y)
(zz : pr1 DB z) (f : B ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : B ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_data (ff ;; gg) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_data x xx)
     (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_data z zz))
  (functor_comp (functor_fix_fst_arg A B C F a) f g)
  (♯ disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_data ff ;; ♯ disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_data
                                           gg)

DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C

FF: disp_functor F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC
a: A
da: DA a
∏ (x : B) (xx : DB x),
♯ disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_data (id_disp xx) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_data x xx)
     (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_data x xx))
  (functor_id (functor_fix_fst_arg A B C F a) x)
  (id_disp (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_data x xx))

a: A

x: B
xx: DB x
♯ disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_data (id_disp xx) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_data x xx)
     (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_data x xx))
  (functor_id (functor_fix_fst_arg A B C F a) x)

FF: disp_functor F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC
a: A
da: DA a
x: B
xx: DB x
disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_mor (id_disp xx) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob xx)
     (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob xx))
  (functor_id (functor_fix_fst_arg A B C F a) x)
  (id_disp (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob xx))

      
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
F: A ⊠ B ⟶ C
FF: disp_functor F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC
a: A
da: DA a
x: B
xx: DB x
♯ FF (id_disp (pr1 (da,, xx)),, id_disp xx) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob xx)
     (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob xx))
  (functor_id (functor_fix_fst_arg A B C F a) x)
  (id_disp (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob xx))

      
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
F: A ⊠ B ⟶ C
FF: disp_functor F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC
a: A
da: DA a
x: B
xx: DB x
transportb
  (mor_disp (FF (a,, x) (da,, xx))
     (FF (a,, x) (da,, xx))) (functor_id F (a,, x))
  (id_disp (FF (a,, x) (da,, xx))) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob xx)
     (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob xx))
  (functor_id (functor_fix_fst_arg A B C F a) x)
  (id_disp (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob xx))

      
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
F: A ⊠ B ⟶ C
FF: disp_functor F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC
a: A
da: DA a
x: B
xx: DB x
transportb
  (mor_disp (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob xx)
     (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob xx))
  (! functor_id (functor_fix_fst_arg A B C F a) x)
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (FF (a,, x) (da,, xx))
        (FF (a,, x) (da,, xx))) (functor_id F (a,, x))
     (id_disp (FF (a,, x) (da,, xx)))) =
id_disp (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob xx)

      
A, B, C: category

DC: disp_cat C

da: DA a
x: B
xx: DB x
transportb
  (mor_disp (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob xx)
     (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob xx))
  (! functor_id (functor_fix_fst_arg A B C F a) x)
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (FF (a,, x) (da,, xx))
        (FF (a,, x) (da,, xx))) (functor_id F (a,, x))
     (id_disp (FF (a,, x) (da,, xx)))) = ?b

x: B
xx: DB x
?b = id_disp (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob xx)

  (mor_disp (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob xx)
     (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob xx))
  (! functor_id (functor_fix_fst_arg A B C F a) x)
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (FF (a,, x) (da,, xx))
        (FF (a,, x) (da,, xx))) (functor_id F (a,, x))
     (id_disp (FF (a,, x) (da,, xx)))) = ?b
 apply transport_f_f. 
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
F: A ⊠ B ⟶ C
FF: disp_functor F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC
a: A
da: DA a
x: B
xx: DB x
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF (a,, x) (da,, xx))
     (FF (a,, x) (da,, xx)))
  (! functor_id F (a,, x) @
   ! (! functor_id (functor_fix_fst_arg A B C F a) x))
  (id_disp (FF (a,, x) (da,, xx))) =
id_disp (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob xx)

a: A
da: DA a
x: B
xx: DB x
isaset
  (C ⟦ functor_fix_fst_arg_ob A B C F a x,
   functor_fix_fst_arg_ob A B C F a x ⟧)

      apply C.

DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C

FF: disp_functor F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC
a: A
da: DA a
x, y, z: B
xx: DB x
yy: pr1 DB y
zz: pr1 DB z
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
transportb
  (mor_disp (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob xx)
     (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob zz))
  (! functor_comp (functor_fix_fst_arg A B C F a) f g)
  (♯ FF (id_disp (pr1 (da,, xx)),, ff ;; gg)) =

A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
F: A ⊠ B ⟶ C
FF: disp_functor F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC
a: A
da: DA a
x, y, z: B
xx: DB x
yy: pr1 DB y
zz: pr1 DB z
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
X:= @disp_functor_comp_var (A ⊠ B) C F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC FF: ∏ (x y z : A ⊠ B) (xx : (DA ⊠⊠ DB) x)
(yy : pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ DB) y) (zz : pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ DB) z)
(f : A ⊠ B ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : A ⊠ B ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF z zz))
  (functor_comp F f g) (♯ FF (ff ;; gg)) =
♯ FF ff ;; ♯ FF gg
transportb
  (mor_disp (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob xx)
     (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob zz))
  (! functor_comp (functor_fix_fst_arg A B C F a) f g)
  (♯ FF (id_disp (pr1 (da,, xx)),, ff ;; gg)) =
♯ FF (id_disp (pr1 (da,, xx)),, ff) ;; ♯ FF
                                         (id_disp
                                            (pr1
                                               (da,,
                                                yy)),,
                                          gg)

      
A, B, C: category

DC: disp_cat C

x, y, z: B

zz: pr1 DB z
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
X:= @disp_functor_comp_var (A ⊠ B) C F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC FF: ∏ (x y z : A ⊠ B) (xx : (DA ⊠⊠ DB) x)
(yy : pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ DB) y) (zz : pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ DB) z)
(f : A ⊠ B ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : A ⊠ B ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF z zz))
  (functor_comp F f g) (♯ FF (ff ;; gg)) =
♯ FF ff ;; ♯ FF gg
transportb
  (mor_disp (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob xx)
     (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob zz))
  (! functor_comp (functor_fix_fst_arg A B C F a) f g)
  (♯ FF (id_disp (pr1 (da,, xx)),, ff ;; gg)) = ?b

DC: disp_cat C

a: A
da: DA a
x, y, z: B
xx: DB x
yy: pr1 DB y
zz: pr1 DB z
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
X:= @disp_functor_comp_var (A ⊠ B) C F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC FF: ∏ (x y z : A ⊠ B) (xx : (DA ⊠⊠ DB) x)
(yy : pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ DB) y) (zz : pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ DB) z)
(f : A ⊠ B ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : A ⊠ B ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF z zz))
  (functor_comp F f g) (♯ FF (ff ;; gg)) =
♯ FF ff ;; ♯ FF gg
?b =
♯ FF (id_disp (pr1 (da,, xx)),, ff) ;; ♯ FF
                                         (id_disp
                                            (pr1
                                               (da,,
                                                yy)),,
                                          gg)

      
A, B, C: category

g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
X:= @disp_functor_comp_var (A ⊠ B) C F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC FF: ∏ (x y z : A ⊠ B) (xx : (DA ⊠⊠ DB) x)
(yy : pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ DB) y) (zz : pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ DB) z)
(f : A ⊠ B ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : A ⊠ B ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF z zz))
  (functor_comp F f g) (♯ FF (ff ;; gg)) =
♯ FF ff ;; ♯ FF gg
?b =
♯ FF (id_disp (pr1 (da,, xx)),, ff) ;; ♯ FF

                                               (da,,
                                                yy)),,
                                          gg)
 apply X. 
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
F: A ⊠ B ⟶ C
FF: disp_functor F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC
a: A
da: DA a
x, y, z: B
xx: DB x
yy: pr1 DB y
zz: pr1 DB z
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
X:= @disp_functor_comp_var (A ⊠ B) C F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC FF: ∏ (x y z : A ⊠ B) (xx : (DA ⊠⊠ DB) x)
(yy : pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ DB) y) (zz : pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ DB) z)
(f : A ⊠ B ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : A ⊠ B ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF z zz))
  (functor_comp F f g) (♯ FF (ff ;; gg)) =
♯ FF ff ;; ♯ FF gg
transportb
  (mor_disp (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob xx)
     (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob zz))
  (! functor_comp (functor_fix_fst_arg A B C F a) f g)
  (♯ FF (id_disp (pr1 (da,, xx)),, ff ;; gg)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF (a,, x) (da,, xx))
     (FF (a,, z) (da,, zz)))
  (functor_comp F (id a #, f) (id a #, g))
  (♯ FF
     ((id_disp (pr1 (da,, xx)),, ff) ;; (id_disp
                                           (pr1
                                              (da,, yy)),,
                                         gg)))

      
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
F: A ⊠ B ⟶ C
FF: disp_functor F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC
a: A
da: DA a
x, y, z: B
xx: DB x
yy: pr1 DB y
zz: pr1 DB z
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
X:= @disp_functor_comp_var (A ⊠ B) C F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC FF: ∏ (x y z : A ⊠ B) (xx : (DA ⊠⊠ DB) x)
(yy : pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ DB) y) (zz : pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ DB) z)
(f : A ⊠ B ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : A ⊠ B ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF z zz))
  (functor_comp F f g) (♯ FF (ff ;; gg)) =
♯ FF ff ;; ♯ FF gg
transportb
  (mor_disp (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob xx)
     (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob zz))
  (! functor_comp (functor_fix_fst_arg A B C F a) f g)
  (♯ FF (id_disp da,, ff ;; gg)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF (a,, x) (da,, xx))
     (FF (a,, z) (da,, zz)))
  (functor_comp F (id a #, f) (id a #, g))
  (♯ FF
     (make_dirprod (id_disp da ;; id_disp da)
        (ff ;; gg)))

      
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
F: A ⊠ B ⟶ C
FF: disp_functor F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC
a: A
da: DA a
x, y, z: B
xx: DB x
yy: pr1 DB y
zz: pr1 DB z
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
X:= @disp_functor_comp_var (A ⊠ B) C F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC FF: ∏ (x y z : A ⊠ B) (xx : (DA ⊠⊠ DB) x)
(yy : pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ DB) y) (zz : pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ DB) z)
(f : A ⊠ B ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : A ⊠ B ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF z zz))
  (functor_comp F f g) (♯ FF (ff ;; gg)) =
♯ FF ff ;; ♯ FF gg
transportb
  (mor_disp (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob xx)
     (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob zz))
  (functor_comp F (id a #, f) (id a #, g))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob xx)
        (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob zz))
     (! functor_comp (functor_fix_fst_arg A B C F a) f
          g) (♯ FF (id_disp da,, ff ;; gg))) =
♯ FF
  (make_dirprod (id_disp da ;; id_disp da) (ff ;; gg))

da: DA a
x, y, z: B
xx: DB x
yy: pr1 DB y
zz: pr1 DB z
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
X:= @disp_functor_comp_var (A ⊠ B) C F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC FF: ∏ (x y z : A ⊠ B) (xx : (DA ⊠⊠ DB) x)
(yy : pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ DB) y) (zz : pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ DB) z)
(f : A ⊠ B ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : A ⊠ B ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF z zz))
  (functor_comp F f g) (♯ FF (ff ;; gg)) =
♯ FF ff ;; ♯ FF gg
?b =
♯ FF
  (make_dirprod (id_disp da ;; id_disp da) (ff ;; gg))

  (functor_comp F f g) (♯ FF (ff ;; gg)) =

?y = id_disp da ;; id_disp da

(yy : pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ DB) y) (zz : pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ DB) z)

transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF z zz))
  (functor_comp F f g) (♯ FF (ff ;; gg)) =

id_disp da ;; id_disp da = ?y

                    apply id_left_disp. 
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
F: A ⊠ B ⟶ C
FF: disp_functor F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC
a: A
da: DA a
x, y, z: B
xx: DB x
yy: pr1 DB y
zz: pr1 DB z
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz

(yy : pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ DB) y) (zz : pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ DB) z)
(f : A ⊠ B ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : A ⊠ B ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF z zz))
  (functor_comp F f g) (♯ FF (ff ;; gg)) =
♯ FF ff ;; ♯ FF gg
transportb
  (mor_disp (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob xx)
     (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob zz))
  (functor_comp F (id a #, f) (id a #, g))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob xx)
        (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob zz))
     (! functor_comp (functor_fix_fst_arg A B C F a) f
          g) (♯ FF (id_disp da,, ff ;; gg))) =
♯ FF
  (make_dirprod
     (transportb (mor_disp da da) (id_left (id a))
        (id_disp da)) (ff ;; gg))

g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧

(yy : pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ DB) y) (zz : pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ DB) z)
(f : A ⊠ B ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : A ⊠ B ⟦ y, z ⟧)

 apply transport_f_f. 
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
F: A ⊠ B ⟶ C
FF: disp_functor F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC
a: A
da: DA a
x, y, z: B
xx: DB x
yy: pr1 DB y
zz: pr1 DB z
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
X:= @disp_functor_comp_var (A ⊠ B) C F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC FF: ∏ (x y z : A ⊠ B) (xx : (DA ⊠⊠ DB) x)
(yy : pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ DB) y) (zz : pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ DB) z)
(f : A ⊠ B ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : A ⊠ B ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF z zz))
  (functor_comp F f g) (♯ FF (ff ;; gg)) =
♯ FF ff ;; ♯ FF gg
transportf
  (mor_disp (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob xx)
     (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob zz))
  (! (! functor_comp (functor_fix_fst_arg A B C F a) f
          g) @
   ! functor_comp F (id a #, f) (id a #, g))
  (♯ FF (id_disp da,, ff ;; gg)) =
♯ FF
  (make_dirprod
     (transportb (mor_disp da da) (id_left (id a))
        (id_disp da)) (ff ;; gg))

  (functor_comp F f g) (♯ FF (ff ;; gg)) =

♯ FF
  (make_dirprod
     (transportb (mor_disp da da) (id_left (id a))
        (id_disp da)) (ff ;; gg)) =
transportf

     (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob zz))
  (! (! functor_comp (functor_fix_fst_arg A B C F a) f
          g) @
   ! functor_comp F (id a #, f) (id a #, g))
  (♯ FF (id_disp da,, ff ;; gg))

(yy : pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ DB) y) (zz : pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ DB) z)

  (functor_comp F f g) (♯ FF (ff ;; gg)) =

  (make_dirprod
     (transportb (mor_disp da da) (id_left (id a))
        (id_disp da)) (ff ;; gg)) = ?b
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
F: A ⊠ B ⟶ C
FF: disp_functor F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC
a: A
da: DA a
x, y, z: B
xx: DB x
yy: pr1 DB y
zz: pr1 DB z
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
X:= @disp_functor_comp_var (A ⊠ B) C F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC FF: ∏ (x y z : A ⊠ B) (xx : (DA ⊠⊠ DB) x)
(yy : pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ DB) y) (zz : pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ DB) z)
(f : A ⊠ B ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : A ⊠ B ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF z zz))
  (functor_comp F f g) (♯ FF (ff ;; gg)) =
♯ FF ff ;; ♯ FF gg
?b =
transportf
  (mor_disp (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob xx)
     (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob zz))
  (! (! functor_comp (functor_fix_fst_arg A B C F a) f
          g) @
   ! functor_comp F (id a #, f) (id a #, g))
  (♯ FF (id_disp da,, ff ;; gg))

      
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
F: A ⊠ B ⟶ C
FF: disp_functor F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC
a: A
da: DA a
x, y, z: B
xx: DB x
yy: pr1 DB y
zz: pr1 DB z
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
X:= @disp_functor_comp_var (A ⊠ B) C F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC FF: ∏ (x y z : A ⊠ B) (xx : (DA ⊠⊠ DB) x)
(yy : pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ DB) y) (zz : pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ DB) z)
(f : A ⊠ B ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : A ⊠ B ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF z zz))
  (functor_comp F f g) (♯ FF (ff ;; gg)) =
♯ FF ff ;; ♯ FF gg
(let X := ♯ FF (id_disp da,, ff ;; gg) in
 transportf
   (mor_disp (FF (a,, x) (da,, xx))
      (FF (a,, z) (da,, zz)))
   (maponpaths (# F)%cat
      (maponpaths_2
         (tpair (λ _ : A ⟦ a, a ⟧, B ⟦ x, z ⟧))
         (! id_left (id a)) (f · g))) X) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob xx)
     (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob zz))
  (! (! functor_comp (functor_fix_fst_arg A B C F a) f
          g) @
   ! functor_comp F (id a #, f) (id a #, g))
  (♯ FF (id_disp da,, ff ;; gg))

      
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
F: A ⊠ B ⟶ C
FF: disp_functor F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC
a: A
da: DA a
x, y, z: B
xx: DB x
yy: pr1 DB y
zz: pr1 DB z
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
X:= @disp_functor_comp_var (A ⊠ B) C F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC FF: ∏ (x y z : A ⊠ B) (xx : (DA ⊠⊠ DB) x)
(yy : pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ DB) y) (zz : pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ DB) z)
(f : A ⊠ B ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : A ⊠ B ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF z zz))
  (functor_comp F f g) (♯ FF (ff ;; gg)) =
♯ FF ff ;; ♯ FF gg
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF (a,, x) (da,, xx))
     (FF (a,, z) (da,, zz)))
  (maponpaths (# F)%cat
     (maponpaths_2
        (tpair (λ _ : A ⟦ a, a ⟧, B ⟦ x, z ⟧))
        (! id_left (id a)) (f · g)))
  (♯ FF (id_disp da,, ff ;; gg)) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob xx)
     (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob zz))
  (! (! functor_comp (functor_fix_fst_arg A B C F a) f
          g) @
   ! functor_comp F (id a #, f) (id a #, g))
  (♯ FF (id_disp da,, ff ;; gg))

      
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
F: A ⊠ B ⟶ C
FF: disp_functor F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC
a: A
da: DA a
x, y, z: B
xx: DB x
yy: pr1 DB y
zz: pr1 DB z
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
X:= @disp_functor_comp_var (A ⊠ B) C F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC FF: ∏ (x y z : A ⊠ B) (xx : (DA ⊠⊠ DB) x)
(yy : pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ DB) y) (zz : pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ DB) z)
(f : A ⊠ B ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : A ⊠ B ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF z zz))
  (functor_comp F f g) (♯ FF (ff ;; gg)) =
♯ FF ff ;; ♯ FF gg
transportb
  (mor_disp (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob xx)
     (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob zz))
  (! (! functor_comp (functor_fix_fst_arg A B C F a) f
          g) @
   ! functor_comp F (id a #, f) (id a #, g))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (FF (a,, x) (da,, xx))
        (FF (a,, z) (da,, zz)))
     (maponpaths (# F)%cat
        (maponpaths_2
           (tpair (λ _ : A ⟦ a, a ⟧, B ⟦ x, z ⟧))
           (! id_left (id a)) (f · g)))
     (♯ FF (id_disp da,, ff ;; gg))) =
♯ FF (id_disp da,, ff ;; gg)

      
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
F: A ⊠ B ⟶ C
FF: disp_functor F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC
a: A
da: DA a
x, y, z: B
xx: DB x
yy: pr1 DB y
zz: pr1 DB z
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
X:= @disp_functor_comp_var (A ⊠ B) C F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC FF: ∏ (x y z : A ⊠ B) (xx : (DA ⊠⊠ DB) x)
(yy : pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ DB) y) (zz : pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ DB) z)
(f : A ⊠ B ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : A ⊠ B ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF z zz))
  (functor_comp F f g) (♯ FF (ff ;; gg)) =
♯ FF ff ;; ♯ FF gg
transportb
  (mor_disp (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob xx)
     (disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_ob zz))
  (! (! functor_comp (functor_fix_fst_arg A B C F a) f
          g) @
   ! functor_comp F (id a #, f) (id a #, g))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (FF (a,, x) (da,, xx))
        (FF (a,, z) (da,, zz)))
     (maponpaths (# F)%cat
        (maponpaths_2
           (tpair (λ _ : A ⟦ a, a ⟧, B ⟦ x, z ⟧))
           (! id_left (id a)) (f · g)))
     (♯ FF (id_disp da,, ff ;; gg))) = ?b
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
F: A ⊠ B ⟶ C
FF: disp_functor F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC
a: A
da: DA a
x, y, z: B
xx: DB x
yy: pr1 DB y
zz: pr1 DB z
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
X:= @disp_functor_comp_var (A ⊠ B) C F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC FF: ∏ (x y z : A ⊠ B) (xx : (DA ⊠⊠ DB) x)
(yy : pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ DB) y) (zz : pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ DB) z)
(f : A ⊠ B ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : A ⊠ B ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF z zz))
  (functor_comp F f g) (♯ FF (ff ;; gg)) =
♯ FF ff ;; ♯ FF gg
?b = ♯ FF (id_disp da,, ff ;; gg)
 
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
F: A ⊠ B ⟶ C
FF: disp_functor F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC
a: A
da: DA a
x, y, z: B
xx: DB x
yy: pr1 DB y
zz: pr1 DB z
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
X:= @disp_functor_comp_var (A ⊠ B) C F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC FF: ∏ (x y z : A ⊠ B) (xx : (DA ⊠⊠ DB) x)
(yy : pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ DB) y) (zz : pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ DB) z)
(f : A ⊠ B ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : A ⊠ B ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF z zz))
  (functor_comp F f g) (♯ FF (ff ;; gg)) =
♯ FF ff ;; ♯ FF gg
transportf
  (mor_disp (FF (a,, x) (da,, xx))
     (FF (a,, z) (da,, zz)))
  (maponpaths (# F)%cat
     (maponpaths_2
        (tpair (λ _ : A ⟦ a, a ⟧, B ⟦ x, z ⟧))
        (! id_left (id a)) (f · g)) @
   ! (! (! functor_comp
             (functor_fix_fst_arg A B C F a) f g) @
      ! functor_comp F (id a #, f) (id a #, g)))
  (♯ FF (id_disp da,, ff ;; gg)) =
♯ FF (id_disp da,, ff ;; gg)

      
A, B, C: category
DA: disp_cat A
DB: disp_cat B
DC: disp_cat C
F: A ⊠ B ⟶ C
FF: disp_functor F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC
a: A
da: DA a
x, y, z: B
xx: DB x
yy: pr1 DB y
zz: pr1 DB z
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
X:= @disp_functor_comp_var (A ⊠ B) C F (DA ⊠⊠ DB) DC FF: ∏ (x y z : A ⊠ B) (xx : (DA ⊠⊠ DB) x)
(yy : pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ DB) y) (zz : pr1 (DA ⊠⊠ DB) z)
(f : A ⊠ B ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : A ⊠ B ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
transportf (mor_disp (FF x xx) (FF z zz))
  (functor_comp F f g) (♯ FF (ff ;; gg)) =
♯ FF ff ;; ♯ FF gg
isaset
  (C ⟦ functor_fix_fst_arg_ob A B C F a x,
   functor_fix_fst_arg_ob A B C F a z ⟧)

      apply C.
  Qed.

  Definition disp_functor_fix_fst_arg
    : disp_functor (functor_fix_fst_arg _ _ _ F a) DB DC
    := _ ,, disp_functor_fix_fst_arg_axioms.

End disp_fix_fst_arg.





Definition displayed_tensor
           {C : category}
           (tensor : C ⊠ C ⟶ C)
           (D : disp_cat C)
  : UU
  := disp_functor tensor (disp_binprod D D) D.

Identity Coercion displayed_tensor_to_disp_functor : displayed_tensor >-> disp_functor.

Definition total_tensor
           {C : category}
           (T : C ⊠ C ⟶ C)
           {D : disp_cat C}
           (TT : displayed_tensor T D)
  : total_category D ⊠ total_category D ⟶ total_category D
  := total_bifunctor T TT.


Section section_tensor.


  (**
              TT
    D × D ------------> D
    ∧   ∧               ∧
   S|   |S              |S
    C × C ------------> C
               T
   *)

  Context {C : category}
          {D : disp_cat C}
          (T : C ⊠ C ⟶ C)
          (TT : displayed_tensor T D)
          (S : section_disp D).


  Local Definition make_prodmor
        {a₁ a₂ b₁ b₂ : C}
        (f₁ : a₁ --> b₁)
        (f₂ : a₂ --> b₂)
    : C ⊠ C ⟦ a₁,,a₂ , b₁,,b₂ ⟧
    := (f₁ ,, f₂).

  Local Notation "f ⊠' f'" := (make_prodmor f f') (at level 30).


  Local Definition make_dispprodmor
        {a₁ a₂ b₁ b₂ : C}
        {f₁ : a₁ --> b₁}
        {f₂ : a₂ --> b₂}
        {d₁ : D a₁}
        {d₂ : D a₂}
        {e₁ : D b₁}
        {e₂ : D b₂}
        (ff₁ : d₁ -->[f₁] e₁)
        (ff₂ : d₂ -->[f₂] e₂)
    : @mor_disp _ (D⊠⊠D) (a₁,,a₂) (b₁,,b₂) (d₁ ,, d₂ )  ( e₁ ,, e₂ ) ( f₁ ,, f₂ )
    := ff₁ ,, ff₂.

  Local Notation "f ⊠⊠' f'" := (make_dispprodmor f f') (at level 30).


  (** This is leaving the displayed world, so is only useful for validation *)
  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
C ⊠ C ⟶ total_category D ⊠ total_category D

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
C ⊠ C ⟶ total_category D ⊠ total_category D

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
C ⟶ total_category D
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
C ⟶ total_category D

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
C ⟶ total_category D
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
section_disp D

      exact S.
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
C ⟶ total_category D
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
section_disp D

      exact S.
  Defined.

  (*  This does not hold, but hints at what we want to ask for
  Lemma foobar : functor_composite T (section_functor S) = functor_composite section_functor_pair (total_tensor T TT).
  Proof.
    apply functor_eq.
    - apply homset_property.
    - cbn.
      use total2_paths_f.
      + cbn.
        apply funextsec.
        intros [c c'].
        cbn.
        use total2_paths_f.
        * apply idpath.
        * cbn.
 *)


  (**
        For a strict monoidal functor, the square above should commute
        up to a displayed natural isomorphism in the D that is the identity in C
   *)

  Definition monoidal_tensor_section_data : UU
    := ∏ (c c' : C),
      z_iso_disp
        (identity_z_iso (T (c,,c')))
        (S (T (c,,c')))
        (TT _ ((S c,, S c') : (D ⊠⊠ D)(c,,c'))).

  (*
     Without the identity coercerion [displayed_tensor_to_disp_functor] above,
     we would need to write
     disp_functor_on_objects (TT : disp_functor _ _ _) ((S c,, S c') : (D ⊠⊠ D)(c,,c'))
     instead of
     TT _ ((S c,, S c') : (D ⊠⊠ D)(c,,c'))
   *)

  (** Naturality for [monoidal_tensor_section_data]

     S(T(c₁ c₁')) ---α(c₁ c₁')---> TT(Sc₁, Sc₁')
                |                  |
    S(T(f₁ f₂)  |                  | TT(Sf₁,Sf₂)
                v                  v
     S(T(c₂ c₂')) ---α(c₂ c₂')---> TT(Sc₂, c₂')

    Note that this equation is ill-typed:
    the down-then-horizontal lives over T(f₁,f₂) · id_iso,
    the horizontal-then-down lives over id_iso · T(f₁,f₂)
    We transport them both to live over T(f₁,f₂)
   *)

  Definition monoidal_tensor_section_natural (α : monoidal_tensor_section_data)
    : UU
    :=
    ∏ (c₁ c₁' c₂ c₂' : C) (f : c₁ --> c₂) (f' : c₁' --> c₂'),
      transportf
        (mor_disp _ _ )
        (id_right _ )
        (section_disp_on_morphisms S ((#T ( f ⊠' f')) %cat) ;; α _ _)
      =
        transportf
          (mor_disp _ _ )
          (id_left _ )
          (α _ _ ;; ♯ TT (section_disp_on_morphisms S f ⊠⊠' (section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))).

  Definition monoidal_tensor_section : UU
    := ∑ (α : monoidal_tensor_section_data), monoidal_tensor_section_natural α.

  Coercion monoidal_tensor_section_data_from_monoidal_tensor_section (α : monoidal_tensor_section)
    : monoidal_tensor_section_data
    := pr1 α.

  Definition monoidal_tensor_ax
             (α : monoidal_tensor_section)
             (c₁ c₁' c₂ c₂' : C)
             (f : c₁ --> c₂)
             (f' : c₁' --> c₂')
    :
    transportf
        (mor_disp _ _ )
        (id_right _ )
        (section_disp_on_morphisms S ((#T ( f ⊠' f')) %cat) ;; pr1 α _ _)
      =
        transportf
          (mor_disp _ _ )
          (id_left _ )
          (pr1 α _ _ ;; ♯TT (section_disp_on_morphisms S f ⊠⊠' (section_disp_on_morphisms S f')))
    := pr2 α _ _ _ _ f f'.

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
c₁, c₁', c₂, c₂': C
f: C ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
f': C ⟦ c₁', c₂' ⟧
section_disp_on_morphisms S ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f')) ;; 
pr1 α c₂ c₂' =
transportb
  (mor_disp (S (T (c₁,, c₁')))
     (TT (c₂,, c₂') (S c₂,, S c₂')))
  (id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (S (T (c₁,, c₁')))
        (TT (c₂,, c₂') (S c₂,, S c₂')))
     (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')))
     (pr1 α c₁ c₁' ;; ♯ TT
                        (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                         ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms
                               S f')))

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
c₁, c₁', c₂, c₂': C
f: C ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
f': C ⟦ c₁', c₂' ⟧
section_disp_on_morphisms S ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f')) ;; 
pr1 α c₂ c₂' =
transportb
  (mor_disp (S (T (c₁,, c₁')))
     (TT (c₂,, c₂') (S c₂,, S c₂')))
  (id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (S (T (c₁,, c₁')))
        (TT (c₂,, c₂') (S c₂,, S c₂')))
     (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')))
     (pr1 α c₁ c₁' ;; ♯ TT
                        (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                         ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms
                               S f')))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
c₁, c₁', c₂, c₂': C
f: C ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
f': C ⟦ c₁', c₂' ⟧
transportb
  (mor_disp (S (T (c₁,, c₁')))
     (TT (c₂,, c₂') (S c₂,, S c₂')))
  (! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')))
  (section_disp_on_morphisms S ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f')) ;; 
   pr1 α c₂ c₂') =
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (c₁,, c₁')))
     (TT (c₂,, c₂') (S c₂,, S c₂')))
  (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')))
  (pr1 α c₁ c₁' ;; ♯ TT
                     (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                      ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S
                            f'))

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
c₁, c₁', c₂, c₂': C
f: C ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
f': C ⟦ c₁', c₂' ⟧
transportb
  (mor_disp (S (T (c₁,, c₁')))
     (TT (c₂,, c₂') (S c₂,, S c₂')))
  (! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')))
  (section_disp_on_morphisms S ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f')) ;; 
   pr1 α c₂ c₂') = ?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
c₁, c₁', c₂, c₂': C
f: C ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
f': C ⟦ c₁', c₂' ⟧
?b =
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (c₁,, c₁')))
     (TT (c₂,, c₂') (S c₂,, S c₂')))
  (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')))
  (pr1 α c₁ c₁' ;; ♯ TT
                     (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                      ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S
                            f'))
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
c₁, c₁', c₂, c₂': C
f: C ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
f': C ⟦ c₁', c₂' ⟧
?b =
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (c₁,, c₁')))
     (TT (c₂,, c₂') (S c₂,, S c₂')))
  (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')))
  (pr1 α c₁ c₁' ;; ♯ TT
                     (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                      ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S
                            f'))
 apply monoidal_tensor_ax. 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
c₁, c₁', c₂, c₂': C
f: C ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
f': C ⟦ c₁', c₂' ⟧
transportb
  (mor_disp (S (T (c₁,, c₁')))
     (TT (c₂,, c₂') (S c₂,, S c₂')))
  (! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')))
  (section_disp_on_morphisms S ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f')) ;; 
   pr1 α c₂ c₂') =
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (c₁,, c₁')))
     (TT (c₂,, c₂') (S c₂,, S c₂')))
  (id_right ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f')))
  (section_disp_on_morphisms S ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f')) ;; 
   pr1 α c₂ c₂')

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
c₁, c₁', c₂, c₂': C
f: C ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
f': C ⟦ c₁', c₂' ⟧
! (! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f'))) =
id_right ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f'))

    apply C.
  Qed.



  (* Sanity check looks ok, but is cumbersome to prove *)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
nat_iso (T ∙ section_functor S)
  (section_functor_pair ∙ total_tensor T TT)

  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
nat_iso (T ∙ section_functor S)
  (section_functor_pair ∙ total_tensor T TT)

    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
T ∙ section_functor S
⟹ section_functor_pair ∙ total_tensor T TT
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
is_nat_iso ?μ

⟹ section_functor_pair ∙ total_tensor T TT

TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
