  (section_functor_pair ∙ total_tensor T TT)
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
is_nat_trans (T ∙ section_functor S)
  (section_functor_pair ∙ total_tensor T TT) ?t

      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
nat_trans_data (T ∙ section_functor S)
  (section_functor_pair ∙ total_tensor T TT)
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a: C ⊠ C
total_category D ⟦ (T ∙ section_functor S) a,
(section_functor_pair ∙ total_tensor T TT) a ⟧

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a: C ⊠ C
∑ f : C ⟦ T a, T (make_dirprod (pr1 a) (pr2 a)) ⟧,
S (T a) -->[
f] TT (make_dirprod (pr1 a) (pr2 a))
     (make_dirprod (S (pr1 a)) (S (pr2 a)))

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a: C ⊠ C
C ⟦ T a, T (make_dirprod (pr1 a) (pr2 a)) ⟧
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a: C ⊠ C
(λ f : C ⟦ T a, T (make_dirprod (pr1 a) (pr2 a)) ⟧,
 S (T a) -->[
 f] TT (make_dirprod (pr1 a) (pr2 a))
      (make_dirprod (S (pr1 a)) (S (pr2 a)))) ?pr1

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a: C ⊠ C
C ⟦ T a, T (make_dirprod (pr1 a) (pr2 a)) ⟧
 exact (identity_iso _ ).
        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a: C ⊠ C
(λ f : C ⟦ T a, T (make_dirprod (pr1 a) (pr2 a)) ⟧,
 S (T a) -->[
 f] TT (make_dirprod (pr1 a) (pr2 a))
      (make_dirprod (S (pr1 a)) (S (pr2 a))))
  (identity_iso (T a))
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a: C ⊠ C
S (T a) -->[
id T a] TT (make_dirprod (pr1 a) (pr2 a))
          (make_dirprod (S (pr1 a)) (S (pr2 a)))
 apply α.
      
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
is_nat_trans (T ∙ section_functor S)
  (section_functor_pair ∙ total_tensor T TT)
  ((λ a : C ⊠ C,
    identity_iso (T a),,
    ((let X := pr1 α in
      let X0 := λ c c' : C, pr1 (X c c') in
      X0 (pr1 a) (pr2 a))
     :
     (λ f : C ⟦ T a, T (make_dirprod (pr1 a) (pr2 a))
            ⟧,
      S (T a) -->[
      f] TT (make_dirprod (pr1 a) (pr2 a))
           (make_dirprod (S (pr1 a)) (S (pr2 a))))
       (identity_iso (T a)))
    :
    total_category D ⟦ (T ∙ section_functor S) a,
    (section_functor_pair ∙ total_tensor T TT) a ⟧)
   :
   nat_trans_data (T ∙ section_functor S)
     (section_functor_pair ∙ total_tensor T TT))
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
is_nat_trans
  (functor_composite_data T (section_functor_data S))
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data (section_functor S)
        (section_functor S))
     (functor_composite_data
        (invmap (catiso_ob_weq (catiso_reord D D)),,
         (λ (X Y : (∑ x : C, D x) × (∑ x : C, D x))
          (f : precategory_binproduct_mor
                 (total_category_ob_mor D)
                 (total_category_ob_mor D) X Y),
          reord1_hom_inverse D D
            (reord1_ob_inverse D D X)
            (reord1_ob_inverse D D Y)
            (make_dirprod
               (id pr11 X · pr11 f · id pr11 Y,,
                id_disp (pr21 X) ;; pr21 f ;; id_disp
                                                (pr21 Y))
               (id pr12 X · pr12 f · id pr12 Y,,
                id_disp (pr22 X) ;; pr22 f ;; id_disp
                                                (pr22 Y)))))
        (total_functor_data TT)))
  (λ a : C × C, id T a,, pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 a) (pr2 a)))

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ pr1 (a,, a'), pr1 (b,, b') ⟧
f': C ⟦ pr2 (a,, a'), pr2 (b,, b') ⟧
(# (functor_composite_data T (section_functor_data S)))%cat
  (f,, f')
· (id T (b,, b'),,
   pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (b,, b')) (pr2 (b,, b')))) =
(id T (a,, a'),,
 pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 (a,, a')) (pr2 (a,, a'))))
· (# (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data (section_functor S)
           (section_functor S))
        (functor_composite_data
           (invmap (catiso_ob_weq (catiso_reord D D)),,
            (λ (X Y : (∑ x : C, D x) × (∑ x : C, D x))
             (f : precategory_binproduct_mor
                    (total_category_ob_mor D)
                    (total_category_ob_mor D) X Y),
             reord1_hom_inverse D D
               (reord1_ob_inverse D D X)
               (reord1_ob_inverse D D Y)
               (make_dirprod
                  (id pr11 X · pr11 f · id pr11 Y,,
                   id_disp (pr21 X) ;; pr21 f ;; id_disp
                                                 (pr21 Y))
                  (id pr12 X · pr12 f · id pr12 Y,,
                   id_disp (pr22 X) ;; pr22 f ;; id_disp
                                                 (pr22 Y)))))
           (total_functor_data TT))))%cat (f,, f')

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
(# T)%cat (f,, f') · id T (b,, b'),,
section_disp_on_morphisms S ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) ;; 
pr1 (pr1 α b b') =
id T (a,, a')
· (# T)%cat
    (make_dirprod (id a · f · id b)
       (id a' · f' · id b')),,
pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; ♯ TT
                      (make_dirprod
                         (id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                             S f ;; 
                          id_disp (S b))
                         (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                              S f' ;; 
                          id_disp (S b')))

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
pr1
  ((# T)%cat (f,, f') · id T (b,, b'),,
   section_disp_on_morphisms S ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) ;; 
   pr1 (pr1 α b b')) =
pr1
  (id T (a,, a')
   · (# T)%cat
       (make_dirprod (id a · f · id b)
          (id a' · f' · id b')),,
   pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; ♯ TT
                         (make_dirprod
                            (id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                                S f ;; 
                             id_disp (S b))
                            (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                                 S f' ;; 
                             id_disp (S b'))))
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (make_dirprod b b')
        (make_dirprod (S b) (S b')))) ?p
  (pr2
     ((# T)%cat (f,, f') · id T (b,, b'),,
      section_disp_on_morphisms S ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) ;; 
      pr1 (pr1 α b b'))) =
pr2
  (id T (a,, a')
   · (# T)%cat
       (make_dirprod (id a · f · id b)
          (id a' · f' · id b')),,
   pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; ♯ TT
                         (make_dirprod
                            (id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                                S f ;; 
                             id_disp (S b))
                            (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                                 S f' ;; 
                             id_disp (S b'))))

        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
pr1
  ((# T)%cat (f,, f') · id T (b,, b'),,
   section_disp_on_morphisms S ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) ;; 
   pr1 (pr1 α b b')) =
pr1
  (id T (a,, a')
   · (# T)%cat
       (make_dirprod (id a · f · id b)
          (id a' · f' · id b')),,
   pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; ♯ TT
                         (make_dirprod
                            (id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                                S f ;; 
                             id_disp (S b))
                            (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                                 S f' ;; 
                             id_disp (S b'))))
 (* we can prove this in an ugly way, since in the next goal
             we are transporting along equality between elements of
             a set anyway
             For getting a clean display, it would even be good to
             prove this equality separately and make it `Qed.`.
           *)
          (*cbn.
          etrans.
          apply id_right.
          etrans.
          2 : { eapply pathsinv0. apply id_left. }
          apply maponpaths.

          repeat rewrite id_left.
          repeat rewrite id_right.
          apply idpath.
           *)
          admit.
        
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (make_dirprod b b')
        (make_dirprod (S b) (S b')))) ?p
  (pr2
     ((# T)%cat (f,, f') · id T (b,, b'),,
      section_disp_on_morphisms S ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) ;; 
      pr1 (pr1 α b b'))) =
pr2
  (id T (a,, a')
   · (# T)%cat
       (make_dirprod (id a · f · id b)
          (id a' · f' · id b')),,
   pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; ♯ TT
                         (make_dirprod
                            (id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                                S f ;; 
                             id_disp (S b))
                            (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                                 S f' ;; 
                             id_disp (S b'))))
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (make_dirprod b b')
        (make_dirprod (S b) (S b')))) ?p
  (section_disp_on_morphisms S ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) ;; 
   pr1 (pr1 α b b')) =
pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; ♯ TT
                      (make_dirprod
                         (id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                             S f ;; 
                          id_disp (S b))
                         (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                              S f' ;; 
                          id_disp (S b')))

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (make_dirprod b b')
        (make_dirprod (S b) (S b')))) ?p
  (section_disp_on_morphisms S ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) ;; 
   pr1 (pr1 α b b')) = ?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
?b =
pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; ♯ TT
                      (make_dirprod
                         (id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                             S f ;; 
                          id_disp (S b))
                         (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                              S f' ;; 
                          id_disp (S b')))

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
section_disp_on_morphisms S ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) ;; 
pr1 (pr1 α b b') = ?t2
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (make_dirprod b b')
        (make_dirprod (S b) (S b')))) ?p ?t2 =
pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; ♯ TT
                      (make_dirprod
                         (id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                             S f ;; 
                          id_disp (S b))
                         (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                              S f' ;; 
                          id_disp (S b')))

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (make_dirprod b b')
        (make_dirprod (S b) (S b')))) ?p
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
        (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
     (id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
           (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
        (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')))
        (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                         (section_disp_on_morphisms S
                            f
                          ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms
                                S f')))) =
pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; ♯ TT
                      (make_dirprod
                         (id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                             S f ;; 
                          id_disp (S b))
                         (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                              S f' ;; 
                          id_disp (S b')))

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (make_dirprod b b')
        (make_dirprod (S b) (S b')))) ?p
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
        (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
     (id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
           (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
        (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')))
        (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                         (section_disp_on_morphisms S
                            f
                          ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms
                                S f')))) = ?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
?b =
pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; ♯ TT
                      (make_dirprod
                         (id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                             S f ;; 
                          id_disp (S b))
                         (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                              S f' ;; 
                          id_disp (S b')))
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (make_dirprod b b')
        (make_dirprod (S b) (S b')))) ?p
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
        (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
     (id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
           (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
        (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')))
        (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                         (section_disp_on_morphisms S
                            f
                          ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms
                                S f')))) = ?b
 apply transport_f_f. 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @ ?p)
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
        (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
     (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')))
     (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                      (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                       ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S
                             f'))) =
pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; ♯ TT
                      (make_dirprod
                         (id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                             S f ;; 
                          id_disp (S b))
                         (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                              S f' ;; 
                          id_disp (S b')))

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @ ?p)
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
        (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
     (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')))
     (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                      (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                       ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S
                             f'))) = ?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
?b =
pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; ♯ TT
                      (make_dirprod
                         (id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                             S f ;; 
                          id_disp (S b))
                         (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                              S f' ;; 
                          id_disp (S b')))
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @ ?p)
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
        (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
     (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')))
     (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                      (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                       ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S
                             f'))) = ?b
 apply transport_f_f. 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @
   ! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @ ?p)
  (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                    ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f')) =
pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; ♯ TT
                      (make_dirprod
                         (id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                             S f ;; 
                          id_disp (S b))
                         (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                              S f' ;; 
                          id_disp (S b')))

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; ♯ TT
                      (make_dirprod
                         (id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                             S f ;; 
                          id_disp (S b))
                         (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                              S f' ;; 
                          id_disp (S b'))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @
   ! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @ ?p)
  (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                    ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; ♯ TT
                      (make_dirprod
                         (id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                             S f ;; 
                          id_disp (S b))
                         (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                              S f' ;; 
                          id_disp (S b'))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @
   ! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @ ?p)
  (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                    ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; ♯ TT
                      (make_dirprod
                         (id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                             S f ;; 
                          id_disp (S b))
                         (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                              S f' ;; 
                          id_disp (S b'))) = ?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
?b =
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @
   ! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @ ?p)
  (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                    ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; ♯ TT
                      (make_dirprod
                         (id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                             S f ;; 
                          id_disp (S b))
                         (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                              S f' ;; 
                          id_disp (S b'))) = ?b

                  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
♯ TT
  (make_dirprod
     (id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms S f ;; 
      id_disp (S b))
     (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms S f' ;; 
      id_disp (S b'))) = ?t2

                  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
X':= X (a,, a') (b,, b') (b,, b') (S a,, S a')
  (S b,, S b') (S b,, S b'): ∏ (f : C ⊠ C ⟦ a,, a', b,, b' ⟧)
(g : C ⊠ C ⟦ b,, b', b,, b' ⟧)
(ff : (S a,, S a') -->[ f] (S b,, S b'))
(gg : (S b,, S b') -->[ g] (S b,, S b')),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a'))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
♯ TT
  (make_dirprod
     (id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms S f ;; 
      id_disp (S b))
     (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms S f' ;; 
      id_disp (S b'))) = ?t2

                  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
X':= X (a,, a') (b,, b') (b,, b') (S a,, S a')
  (S b,, S b') (S b,, S b'): ∏ (f : C ⊠ C ⟦ a,, a', b,, b' ⟧)
(g : C ⊠ C ⟦ b,, b', b,, b' ⟧)
(ff : (S a,, S a') -->[ f] (S b,, S b'))
(gg : (S b,, S b') -->[ g] (S b,, S b')),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a'))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
X'':= X' ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
  ((id b) ⊠' (id b')): ∏ (ff : (S a,, S a') -->[ (id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')] (S b,, S b'))
(gg : (S b,, S b') -->[ (id b) ⊠' (id b')] (S b,, S b')),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a')) (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
(functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')) ((id b) ⊠' (id b')))
(♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
♯ TT
  (make_dirprod
     (id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms S f ;; 
      id_disp (S b))
     (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms S f' ;; 
      id_disp (S b'))) = ?t2

                  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
X':= X (a,, a') (b,, b') (b,, b') (S a,, S a')
  (S b,, S b') (S b,, S b'): ∏ (f : C ⊠ C ⟦ a,, a', b,, b' ⟧)
(g : C ⊠ C ⟦ b,, b', b,, b' ⟧)
(ff : (S a,, S a') -->[ f] (S b,, S b'))
(gg : (S b,, S b') -->[ g] (S b,, S b')),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a'))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
X'':= X' ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
  ((id b) ⊠' (id b')): ∏ (ff : (S a,, S a') -->[ (id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')] (S b,, S b'))
(gg : (S b,, S b') -->[ (id b) ⊠' (id b')] (S b,, S b')),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a')) (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
(functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')) ((id b) ⊠' (id b')))
(♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
X3:= X''
  ((id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms S f)
   ⊠⊠' (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                            S f')): ∏
gg : (S b,, S b') -->[
     (id b) ⊠' (id b')] (S b,, S b'),
♯ TT
  ((id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms S
                       f)
   ⊠⊠' (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                            S f') ;; gg) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a'))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
     ((id b) ⊠' (id b')))
  (♯ TT
     ((id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                          S f)
      ⊠⊠' (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                               S f')) ;; ♯ TT gg)
♯ TT
  (make_dirprod
     (id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms S f ;; 
      id_disp (S b))
     (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms S f' ;; 
      id_disp (S b'))) = ?t2

                  
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
X':= X (a,, a') (b,, b') (b,, b') (S a,, S a')
  (S b,, S b') (S b,, S b'): ∏ (f : C ⊠ C ⟦ a,, a', b,, b' ⟧)
(g : C ⊠ C ⟦ b,, b', b,, b' ⟧)
(ff : (S a,, S a') -->[ f] (S b,, S b'))
(gg : (S b,, S b') -->[ g] (S b,, S b')),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a'))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
X'':= X' ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
  ((id b) ⊠' (id b')): ∏ (ff : (S a,, S a') -->[ (id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')] (S b,, S b'))
(gg : (S b,, S b') -->[ (id b) ⊠' (id b')] (S b,, S b')),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a')) (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
(functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')) ((id b) ⊠' (id b')))
(♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
X3:= X''
  ((id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms S f)
   ⊠⊠' (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                            S f')): ∏
gg : (S b,, S b') -->[
     (id b) ⊠' (id b')] (S b,, S b'),
♯ TT
  ((id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms S
                       f)
   ⊠⊠' (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                            S f') ;; gg) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a'))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
     ((id b) ⊠' (id b')))
  (♯ TT
     ((id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                          S f)
      ⊠⊠' (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                               S f')) ;; ♯ TT gg)
X4:= X3 (id_disp (S b) ⊠⊠' id_disp (S b')): ♯ TT
  ((id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms S
                       f)
   ⊠⊠' (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                            S f') ;; id_disp
                                       (S b)
                                     ⊠⊠' id_disp
                                           (S b')) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a'))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
     ((id b) ⊠' (id b')))
  (♯ TT
     ((id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                          S f)
      ⊠⊠' (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                               S f')) ;; ♯ TT
                                           (id_disp
                                              (S
                                                 b)
                                            ⊠⊠' id_disp
                                                 (S
                                                 b')))
♯ TT
  (make_dirprod
     (id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms S f ;; 
      id_disp (S b))
     (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms S f' ;; 
      id_disp (S b'))) = ?t2

                  apply X4.
                
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; transportb
                      (mor_disp
                         (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a'))
                         (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
                      (functor_comp T
                         ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
                         ((id b) ⊠' (id b')))
                      (♯ TT
                         ((id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                              S f)
                          ⊠⊠' (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                                 S f')) ;; 
                       ♯ TT
                         (id_disp (S b)
                          ⊠⊠' id_disp (S b'))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @
   ! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @ ?p)
  (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                    ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))

                
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; transportb
                      (mor_disp
                         (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a'))
                         (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
                      (functor_comp T
                         ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
                         ((id b) ⊠' (id b')))
                      (♯ TT
                         ((id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                              S f)
                          ⊠⊠' (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                                 S f')) ;; 
                       ♯ TT
                         (id_disp (S b)
                          ⊠⊠' id_disp (S b'))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @
   ! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @ ?p)
  (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                    ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; transportb
                      (mor_disp
                         (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a'))
                         (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
                      (functor_comp T
                         ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
                         ((id b) ⊠' (id b')))
                      (♯ TT
                         ((id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                              S f)
                          ⊠⊠' (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                                 S f')) ;; 
                       ♯ TT
                         (id_disp (S b)
                          ⊠⊠' id_disp (S b'))) = ?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
?b =
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @
   ! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @ ?p)
  (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                    ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; transportb
                      (mor_disp
                         (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a'))
                         (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
                      (functor_comp T
                         ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
                         ((id b) ⊠' (id b')))
                      (♯ TT
                         ((id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                              S f)
                          ⊠⊠' (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                                 S f')) ;; 
                       ♯ TT
                         (id_disp (S b)
                          ⊠⊠' id_disp (S b'))) = ?b
 apply mor_disp_transportf_prewhisker. 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; (♯ TT
                          ((id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                               S f)
                           ⊠⊠' (id_disp (S a') ;; 
                                section_disp_on_morphisms
                                  S f')) ;; ♯ TT
                                              (id_disp
                                                 (S b)
                                               ⊠⊠' 
                                               id_disp
                                                 (S b')))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @
   ! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @ ?p)
  (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                    ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; (♯ TT
                          ((id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                               S f)
                           ⊠⊠' (id_disp (S a') ;; 
                                section_disp_on_morphisms
                                  S f')) ;; ♯ TT
                                              (id_disp
                                                 (S b)
                                               ⊠⊠' 
                                               id_disp
                                                 (S b')))) =
?b

S: section_disp D

(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
?b =
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @
   ! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @ ?p)
  (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                    ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; (♯ TT
                          ((id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                               S f)
                           ⊠⊠' (id_disp (S a') ;; 
                                section_disp_on_morphisms
                                  S f')) ;; ♯ TT
                                              (id_disp
                                                 (S b)
                                               ⊠⊠' 
                                               id_disp
                                                 (S b')))) =
?b
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; (♯ TT
                       ((id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                            S f)
                        ⊠⊠' (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                                 S f')) ;; 
                     ♯ TT
                       (id_disp (S b)
                        ⊠⊠' id_disp (S b'))) = ?t2

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
♯ TT
  ((id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms S f)
   ⊠⊠' (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms S
                            f')) ;; ♯ TT
                                      (id_disp (S b)
                                       ⊠⊠' id_disp
                                             (S b')) =
?t2

(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =

  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)

   ⊠⊠' (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms S
                            f')) ;; ♯ TT

(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =

  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)

C: category
D: disp_cat C

α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
♯ TT
  ((id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms S f)
   ⊠⊠' (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms S
                            f')) ;; ♯ TT
                                      (id_disp (S b)
                                       ⊠⊠' id_disp
                                             (S b')) =
?b

              
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
♯ TT (id_disp (S b) ⊠⊠' id_disp (S b')) = ?t20

              
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
X':= @disp_functor_id (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x),
♯ TT (id_disp xx) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT x xx))
  (functor_id T x) (id_disp (TT x xx))
♯ TT (id_disp (S b) ⊠⊠' id_disp (S b')) = ?t20

              apply (X' (b,,b')).
            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
♯ TT
  ((id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms S f)
   ⊠⊠' (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms S
                            f')) ;; transportb
                                      (mor_disp
                                         (TT (b,, b')
                                            (S b,,
                                             S b'))
                                         (TT (b,, b')
                                            (S b,,
                                             S b')))
                                      (functor_id T
                                         (b,, b'))
                                      (id_disp
                                         (TT (b,, b')
                                            (S b,,
                                             S b'))) =
?t2

            apply mor_disp_transportf_prewhisker.
          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; transportf
                         (mor_disp
                            (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a'))
                            (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
                         (maponpaths
                            (compose
                               ((# T)%cat
                                  ((id a · f)
                                   ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
                            (! functor_id T (b,, b')))
                         (♯ TT
                            ((id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                                 S f)
                             ⊠⊠' (id_disp (S a') ;; 
                                  section_disp_on_morphisms
                                    S f')) ;; id_disp
                                                (TT
                                                 (b,,
                                                 b')
                                                 (S b,,
                                                 S b')))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @
   ! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @ ?p)
  (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                    ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; transportf
                         (mor_disp
                            (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a'))
                            (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
                         (maponpaths
                            (compose
                               ((# T)%cat
                                  ((id a · f)
                                   ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
                            (! functor_id T (b,, b')))
                         (♯ TT
                            ((id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                                 S f)
                             ⊠⊠' (id_disp (S a') ;; 
                                  section_disp_on_morphisms
                                    S f')) ;; id_disp
                                                (TT
                                                 (b,,
                                                 b')
                                                 (S b,,
                                                 S b')))) =
?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
?b =
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @
   ! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @ ?p)
  (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                    ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; transportf
                         (mor_disp
                            (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a'))
                            (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
                         (maponpaths
                            (compose
                               ((# T)%cat
                                  ((id a · f)
                                   ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
                            (! functor_id T (b,, b')))
                         (♯ TT
                            ((id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                                 S f)
                             ⊠⊠' (id_disp (S a') ;; 
                                  section_disp_on_morphisms
                                    S f')) ;; id_disp
                                                (TT
                                                 (b,,
                                                 b')
                                                 (S b,,
                                                 S b')))) =
?b
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; transportf
                      (mor_disp
                         (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a'))
                         (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
                      (maponpaths
                         (compose
                            ((# T)%cat
                               ((id a · f)
                                ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
                         (! functor_id T (b,, b')))
                      (♯ TT
                         ((id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                              S f)
                          ⊠⊠' (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                                 S f')) ;; 
                       id_disp
                         (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b'))) =
?t2

            apply mor_disp_transportf_prewhisker. 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
        (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
     (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
        (maponpaths
           (compose
              ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
           (! functor_id T (b,, b'))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; (♯ TT
                             ((id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                                 S f)
                              ⊠⊠' (id_disp (S a') ;; 
                                   section_disp_on_morphisms
                                     S f')) ;; id_disp
                                                 (TT
                                                 (b,,
                                                 b')
                                                 (S b,,
                                                 S b'))))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @
   ! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @ ?p)
  (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                    ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))

S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section

f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
        (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
     (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
        (maponpaths
           (compose
              ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
           (! functor_id T (b,, b'))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; (♯ TT
                             ((id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                                 S f)
                              ⊠⊠' (id_disp (S a') ;; 
                                   section_disp_on_morphisms
                                     S f')) ;; id_disp
                                                 (TT
                                                 (b,,
                                                 b')
                                                 (S b,,
                                                 S b'))))) =

C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section

f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧

(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =

  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)

     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))

     (maponpaths
        (compose

                                section_disp_on_morphisms
                                  S f')) ;; id_disp

                                                 (b,,
                                                 b')
                                                 (S b,,
                                                 S b')))) =
?t2

(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =

D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C

S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
♯ TT
  ((id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms S f)
   ⊠⊠' (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms S
                            f')) ;; id_disp
                                      (TT (b,, b')
                                         (S b,, S b')) =
?t2

            apply id_right_disp.
          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
        (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
     (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
        (maponpaths
           (compose
              ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
           (! functor_id T (b,, b'))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; transportb
                            (mor_disp
                               (TT (a,, a')
                                  (S a,, S a'))
                               (TT (b,, b')
                                  (S b,, S b')))
                            (id_right
                               ((# T)%cat
                                  ((id a · f)
                                   ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
                            (♯ TT
                               ((id_disp (S a) ;; 
                                 section_disp_on_morphisms
                                   S f)
                                ⊠⊠' (id_disp (S a') ;; 
                                     section_disp_on_morphisms
                                       S f'))))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @
   ! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @ ?p)
  (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                    ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))

        (maponpaths
