(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
?b =
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @
   ! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @ ?p)
  (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                    ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
        (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
     (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
        (maponpaths
           (compose
              ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
           (! functor_id T (b,, b'))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; transportb
                            (mor_disp
                               (TT (a,, a')
                                  (S a,, S a'))
                               (TT (b,, b')
                                  (S b,, S b')))
                            (id_right
                               ((# T)%cat
                                  ((id a · f)
                                   ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
                            (♯ TT
                               ((id_disp (S a) ;; 
                                 section_disp_on_morphisms
                                   S f)
                                ⊠⊠' (id_disp (S a') ;; 
                                     section_disp_on_morphisms
                                       S f'))))) = 
?b

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (maponpaths
        (compose
           ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
        (! functor_id T (b,, b'))))
  (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; transportb
                         (mor_disp
                            (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a'))
                            (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
                         (id_right
                            ((# T)%cat
                               ((id a · f)
                                ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
                         (♯ TT
                            ((id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                                 S f)
                             ⊠⊠' (id_disp (S a') ;; 
                                  section_disp_on_morphisms
                                    S f')))) = ?t2

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; transportb
                      (mor_disp
                         (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a'))
                         (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
                      (id_right
                         ((# T)%cat
                            ((id a · f)
                             ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
                      (♯ TT
                         ((id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                              S f)
                          ⊠⊠' (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                                 S f'))) =
?t2

            apply mor_disp_transportf_prewhisker.
          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
        (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
     (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
        (maponpaths
           (compose
              ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
           (! functor_id T (b,, b'))))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
           (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
        (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
           (! id_right
                ((# T)%cat
                   ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')))))
        (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; ♯ TT
                               ((id_disp (S a) ;; 
                                 section_disp_on_morphisms
                                   S f)
                                ⊠⊠' (id_disp (S a') ;; 
                                     section_disp_on_morphisms
                                       S f'))))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @
   ! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @ ?p)
  (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                    ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
        (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
     (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
        (maponpaths
           (compose
              ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
           (! functor_id T (b,, b'))))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
           (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
        (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
           (! id_right
                ((# T)%cat
                   ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')))))
        (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; ♯ TT
                               ((id_disp (S a) ;; 
                                 section_disp_on_morphisms
                                   S f)
                                ⊠⊠' (id_disp (S a') ;; 
                                     section_disp_on_morphisms
                                       S f'))))) = 
?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
?b =
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @
   ! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @ ?p)
  (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                    ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
        (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
     (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
        (maponpaths
           (compose
              ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
           (! functor_id T (b,, b'))))
     (transportf
        (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
           (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
        (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
           (! id_right
                ((# T)%cat
                   ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')))))
        (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; ♯ TT
                               ((id_disp (S a) ;; 
                                 section_disp_on_morphisms
                                   S f)
                                ⊠⊠' (id_disp (S a') ;; 
                                     section_disp_on_morphisms
                                       S f'))))) = 
?b
 apply transport_f_f. 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (maponpaths
        (compose
           ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
        (! functor_id T (b,, b'))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
        (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
     (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
        (! id_right
             ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; ♯ TT
                            ((id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                                 S f)
                             ⊠⊠' (id_disp (S a') ;; 
                                  section_disp_on_morphisms
                                    S f')))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @
   ! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @ ?p)
  (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                    ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (maponpaths
        (compose
           ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
        (! functor_id T (b,, b'))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
        (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
     (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
        (! id_right
             ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; ♯ TT
                            ((id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                                 S f)
                             ⊠⊠' (id_disp (S a') ;; 
                                  section_disp_on_morphisms
                                    S f')))) = ?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
?b =
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @
   ! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @ ?p)
  (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                    ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (maponpaths
        (compose
           ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
        (! functor_id T (b,, b'))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
        (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
     (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
        (! id_right
             ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; ♯ TT
                            ((id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                                 S f)
                             ⊠⊠' (id_disp (S a') ;; 
                                  section_disp_on_morphisms
                                    S f')))) = ?b
 apply transport_f_f. 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! id_right
          ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (maponpaths
        (compose
           ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
        (! functor_id T (b,, b'))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; ♯ TT
                         ((id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                              S f)
                          ⊠⊠' (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                                 S f'))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @
   ! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @ ?p)
  (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                    ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! id_right
          ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (maponpaths
        (compose
           ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
        (! functor_id T (b,, b'))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; ♯ TT
                         ((id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                              S f)
                          ⊠⊠' (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                                 S f'))) =
?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
?b =
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @
   ! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @ ?p)
  (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                    ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! id_right
          ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (maponpaths
        (compose
           ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
        (! functor_id T (b,, b'))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; ♯ TT
                         ((id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                              S f)
                          ⊠⊠' (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                                 S f'))) =
?b

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; ♯ TT
                      ((id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                           S f)
                       ⊠⊠' (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                                S f')) =
?t2

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
♯ TT
  ((id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms S f)
   ⊠⊠' (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms S
                            f')) = ?t2

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
X':= X (a,, a') (a,, a') (b,, b') (S a,, S a')
  (S a,, S a') (S b,, S b'): ∏ (f : C ⊠ C ⟦ a,, a', a,, a' ⟧)
(g : C ⊠ C ⟦ a,, a', b,, b' ⟧)
(ff : (S a,, S a') -->[ f] (S a,, S a'))
(gg : (S a,, S a') -->[ g] (S b,, S b')),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a'))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
♯ TT
  ((id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms S f)
   ⊠⊠' (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms S
                            f')) = ?t2

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
X':= X (a,, a') (a,, a') (b,, b') (S a,, S a')
  (S a,, S a') (S b,, S b'): ∏ (f : C ⊠ C ⟦ a,, a', a,, a' ⟧)
(g : C ⊠ C ⟦ a,, a', b,, b' ⟧)
(ff : (S a,, S a') -->[ f] (S a,, S a'))
(gg : (S a,, S a') -->[ g] (S b,, S b')),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a'))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
X'':= X' ((id a) ⊠' (id a')) (f ⊠' f'): ∏ (ff : (S a,, S a') -->[ (id a) ⊠' (id a')] (S a,, S a'))
(gg : (S a,, S a') -->[ f ⊠' f'] (S b,, S b')),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a')) (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
(functor_comp T ((id a) ⊠' (id a')) (f ⊠' f')) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
♯ TT
  ((id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms S f)
   ⊠⊠' (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms S
                            f')) = ?t2

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
X':= X (a,, a') (a,, a') (b,, b') (S a,, S a')
  (S a,, S a') (S b,, S b'): ∏ (f : C ⊠ C ⟦ a,, a', a,, a' ⟧)
(g : C ⊠ C ⟦ a,, a', b,, b' ⟧)
(ff : (S a,, S a') -->[ f] (S a,, S a'))
(gg : (S a,, S a') -->[ g] (S b,, S b')),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a'))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
X'':= X' ((id a) ⊠' (id a')) (f ⊠' f'): ∏ (ff : (S a,, S a') -->[ (id a) ⊠' (id a')] (S a,, S a'))
(gg : (S a,, S a') -->[ f ⊠' f'] (S b,, S b')),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a')) (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
(functor_comp T ((id a) ⊠' (id a')) (f ⊠' f')) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
X3:= X'' (id_disp (S a) ⊠⊠' id_disp (S a'))
  (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
   ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'): ♯ TT
  (id_disp (S a) ⊠⊠' id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                         S f
                                       ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms
                                             S f') =
transportb
  (mor_disp (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a'))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (functor_comp T ((id a) ⊠' (id a')) (f ⊠' f'))
  (♯ TT (id_disp (S a) ⊠⊠' id_disp (S a')) ;; ♯ TT
                                                (section_disp_on_morphisms
                                                 S
                                                 f
                                                 ⊠⊠' 
                                                 section_disp_on_morphisms
                                                 S
                                                 f'))
♯ TT
  ((id_disp (S a) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms S f)
   ⊠⊠' (id_disp (S a') ;; section_disp_on_morphisms S
                            f')) = ?t2

            apply X3.
          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! id_right
          ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (maponpaths
        (compose
           ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
        (! functor_id T (b,, b'))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; transportb
                         (mor_disp
                            (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a'))
                            (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
                         (functor_comp T
                            ((id a) ⊠' (id a'))
                            (f ⊠' f'))
                         (♯ TT
                            (id_disp (S a)
                             ⊠⊠' id_disp (S a')) ;; 
                          ♯ TT
                            (section_disp_on_morphisms
                               S f
                             ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms
                                   S f'))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @
   ! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @ ?p)
  (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                    ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! id_right
          ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (maponpaths
        (compose
           ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
        (! functor_id T (b,, b'))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; transportb
                         (mor_disp
                            (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a'))
                            (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
                         (functor_comp T
                            ((id a) ⊠' (id a'))
                            (f ⊠' f'))
                         (♯ TT
                            (id_disp (S a)
                             ⊠⊠' id_disp (S a')) ;; 
                          ♯ TT
                            (section_disp_on_morphisms
                               S f
                             ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms
                                   S f'))) = ?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
?b =
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @
   ! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @ ?p)
  (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                    ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))

          
C: category

S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section

f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =

  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! id_right
          ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (maponpaths
        (compose
           ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
        (! functor_id T (b,, b'))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; transportb
                         (mor_disp
                            (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a'))
                            (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
                         (functor_comp T
                            ((id a) ⊠' (id a'))
                            (f ⊠' f'))
                         (♯ TT
                            (id_disp (S a)
                             ⊠⊠' id_disp (S a')) ;; 
                          ♯ TT
                            (section_disp_on_morphisms
                               S f
                             ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms
                                   S f'))) = ?b
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; transportb
                      (mor_disp
                         (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a'))
                         (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
                      (functor_comp T
                         ((id a) ⊠' (id a')) (f ⊠' f'))
                      (♯ TT
                         (id_disp (S a)
                          ⊠⊠' id_disp (S a')) ;; ♯ TT
                                                 (section_disp_on_morphisms
                                                 S f
                                                 ⊠⊠' 
                                                 section_disp_on_morphisms
                                                 S f')) =
?t2

            apply mor_disp_transportf_prewhisker.
          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! id_right
          ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (maponpaths
        (compose
           ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
        (! functor_id T (b,, b'))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
        (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
     (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
        (! functor_comp T ((id a) ⊠' (id a'))
             (f ⊠' f')))
     (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; (♯ TT
                             (id_disp (S a)
                              ⊠⊠' id_disp (S a')) ;; 
                           ♯ TT
                             (section_disp_on_morphisms
                                S f
                              ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms
                                    S f')))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @
   ! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @ ?p)
  (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                    ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! id_right
          ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (maponpaths
        (compose
           ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
        (! functor_id T (b,, b'))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
        (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
     (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
        (! functor_comp T ((id a) ⊠' (id a'))
             (f ⊠' f')))
     (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; (♯ TT
                             (id_disp (S a)
                              ⊠⊠' id_disp (S a')) ;; 
                           ♯ TT
                             (section_disp_on_morphisms
                                S f
                              ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms
                                    S f')))) = ?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
?b =
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @
   ! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @ ?p)
  (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                    ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! id_right
          ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (maponpaths
        (compose
           ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
        (! functor_id T (b,, b'))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
        (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
     (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
        (! functor_comp T ((id a) ⊠' (id a'))
             (f ⊠' f')))
     (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; (♯ TT
                             (id_disp (S a)
                              ⊠⊠' id_disp (S a')) ;; 
                           ♯ TT
                             (section_disp_on_morphisms
                                S f
                              ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms
                                    S f')))) = ?b
 apply transport_f_f. 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a) ⊠' (id a')) (f ⊠' f')) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! id_right
          ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (maponpaths
        (compose
           ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
        (! functor_id T (b,, b'))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; (♯ TT
                          (id_disp (S a)
                           ⊠⊠' id_disp (S a')) ;; 
                        ♯ TT
                          (section_disp_on_morphisms S
                             f
                           ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms
                                 S f'))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @
   ! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @ ?p)
  (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                    ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a) ⊠' (id a')) (f ⊠' f')) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! id_right
          ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (maponpaths
        (compose
           ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
        (! functor_id T (b,, b'))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; (♯ TT
                          (id_disp (S a)
                           ⊠⊠' id_disp (S a')) ;; 
                        ♯ TT
                          (section_disp_on_morphisms S
                             f
                           ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms
                                 S f'))) = ?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
?b =
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @
   ! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @ ?p)
  (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                    ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))


          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a) ⊠' (id a')) (f ⊠' f')) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! id_right
          ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (maponpaths
        (compose
           ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
        (! functor_id T (b,, b'))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; (♯ TT
                          (id_disp (S a)
                           ⊠⊠' id_disp (S a')) ;; 
                        ♯ TT
                          (section_disp_on_morphisms S
                             f
                           ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms
                                 S f'))) = ?b
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; (♯ TT
                       (id_disp (S a)
                        ⊠⊠' id_disp (S a')) ;; ♯ TT
                                                 (section_disp_on_morphisms
                                                 S f
                                                 ⊠⊠' 
                                                 section_disp_on_morphisms
                                                 S f')) =
?t2

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
♯ TT (id_disp (S a) ⊠⊠' id_disp (S a')) ;; ♯ TT
                                             (section_disp_on_morphisms
                                                S f
                                              ⊠⊠' 
                                              section_disp_on_morphisms
                                                S f') =
?t2

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
♯ TT (id_disp (S a) ⊠⊠' id_disp (S a')) = ?y'

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
X':= @disp_functor_id (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x),
♯ TT (id_disp xx) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT x xx))
  (functor_id T x) (id_disp (TT x xx))
♯ TT (id_disp (S a) ⊠⊠' id_disp (S a')) = ?y'

            apply (X' (a,,a')).
          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a) ⊠' (id a')) (f ⊠' f')) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! id_right
          ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (maponpaths
        (compose
           ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
        (! functor_id T (b,, b'))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; (transportb
                          (mor_disp
                             (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a'))
                             (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a')))
                          (functor_id T (a,, a'))
                          (id_disp
                             (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a'))) ;; 
                        ♯ TT
                          (section_disp_on_morphisms S
                             f
                           ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms
                                 S f'))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @
   ! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @ ?p)
  (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                    ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a) ⊠' (id a')) (f ⊠' f')) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! id_right
          ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (maponpaths
        (compose
           ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
        (! functor_id T (b,, b'))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; (transportb
                          (mor_disp
                             (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a'))
                             (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a')))
                          (functor_id T (a,, a'))
                          (id_disp
                             (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a'))) ;; 
                        ♯ TT
                          (section_disp_on_morphisms S
                             f
                           ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms
                                 S f'))) = ?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
?b =
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @
   ! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @ ?p)
  (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                    ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a) ⊠' (id a')) (f ⊠' f')) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! id_right
          ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (maponpaths
        (compose
           ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
        (! functor_id T (b,, b'))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; (transportb
                          (mor_disp
                             (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a'))
                             (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a')))
                          (functor_id T (a,, a'))
                          (id_disp
                             (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a'))) ;; 
                        ♯ TT
                          (section_disp_on_morphisms S
                             f
                           ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms
                                 S f'))) = ?b
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; (transportb
                       (mor_disp
                          (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a'))
                          (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a')))
                       (functor_id T (a,, a'))
                       (id_disp
                          (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a'))) ;; 
                     ♯ TT
                       (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                        ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms
                              S f')) = ?t2

            apply assoc_disp.
          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a) ⊠' (id a')) (f ⊠' f')) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! id_right
          ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (maponpaths
        (compose
           ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
        (! functor_id T (b,, b'))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
        (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
     (assoc (id T (a,, a'))
        ((# T)%cat ((id a) ⊠' (id a')))
        ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f')))
     (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; transportb
                            (mor_disp
                               (TT (a,, a')
                                  (S a,, S a'))
                               (TT (a,, a')
                                  (S a,, S a')))
                            (functor_id T (a,, a'))
                            (id_disp
                               (TT (a,, a')
                                  (S a,, S a'))) ;; 
      ♯ TT
        (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
         ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @
   ! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @ ?p)
  (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                    ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C

S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a) ⊠' (id a')) (f ⊠' f')) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! id_right
          ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (maponpaths
        (compose
           ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
        (! functor_id T (b,, b'))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
        (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
     (assoc (id T (a,, a'))
        ((# T)%cat ((id a) ⊠' (id a')))
        ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f')))
     (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; transportb
                            (mor_disp
                               (TT (a,, a')
                                  (S a,, S a'))
                               (TT (a,, a')
                                  (S a,, S a')))
                            (functor_id T (a,, a'))
                            (id_disp
                               (TT (a,, a')
                                  (S a,, S a'))) ;; 
      ♯ TT
        (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
         ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))) = ?b

S: section_disp D

a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
?b =
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @
   ! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @ ?p)
  (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                    ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a) ⊠' (id a')) (f ⊠' f')) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! id_right
          ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (maponpaths
        (compose
           ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
        (! functor_id T (b,, b'))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
        (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
     (assoc (id T (a,, a'))
        ((# T)%cat ((id a) ⊠' (id a')))
        ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f')))
     (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; transportb
                            (mor_disp
                               (TT (a,, a')
                                  (S a,, S a'))
                               (TT (a,, a')
                                  (S a,, S a')))
                            (functor_id T (a,, a'))
                            (id_disp
                               (TT (a,, a')
                                  (S a,, S a'))) ;; 
      ♯ TT
        (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
         ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))) = ?b
 apply transport_f_f.
          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (! assoc (id T (a,, a'))
       ((# T)%cat ((id a) ⊠' (id a')))
       ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f')) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a) ⊠' (id a')) (f ⊠' f')) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! id_right
          ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (maponpaths
        (compose
           ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
        (! functor_id T (b,, b'))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; transportb
                         (mor_disp
                            (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a'))
                            (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a')))
                         (functor_id T (a,, a'))
                         (id_disp
                            (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a'))) ;; 
   ♯ TT
     (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
      ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f')) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @
   ! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @ ?p)
  (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                    ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))

(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =

  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)

     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))

       ((# T)%cat ((id a) ⊠' (id a')))
       ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f')) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a) ⊠' (id a')) (f ⊠' f')) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! id_right
          ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (maponpaths
        (compose

        (! functor_id T (b,, b'))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))

                            (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a')))

C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; transportb
                      (mor_disp
                         (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a'))
                         (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a')))
                      (functor_id T (a,, a'))
                      (id_disp
                         (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a'))) ;; 
♯ TT
  (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
   ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f') = ?t2

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; transportb
                      (mor_disp
                         (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a'))
                         (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a')))
                      (functor_id T (a,, a'))
                      (id_disp
                         (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a'))) =
?y'

            apply mor_disp_transportf_prewhisker.
          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (! assoc (id T (a,, a'))
       ((# T)%cat ((id a) ⊠' (id a')))
       ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f')) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a) ⊠' (id a')) (f ⊠' f')) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! id_right
          ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (maponpaths
        (compose
           ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
        (! functor_id T (b,, b'))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
        (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a')))
     (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
        (! functor_id T (a,, a')))
     (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; id_disp
                            (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a'))) ;; 
   ♯ TT
     (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
      ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f')) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @
   ! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @ ?p)
  (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                    ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (! assoc (id T (a,, a'))
       ((# T)%cat ((id a) ⊠' (id a')))
       ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f')) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a) ⊠' (id a')) (f ⊠' f')) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! id_right
          ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (maponpaths
        (compose
           ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
        (! functor_id T (b,, b'))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
        (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a')))
     (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
        (! functor_id T (a,, a')))
     (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; id_disp
                            (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a'))) ;; 
   ♯ TT
     (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
      ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f')) = ?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
?b =
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @
   ! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @ ?p)
  (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                    ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (! assoc (id T (a,, a'))
       ((# T)%cat ((id a) ⊠' (id a')))
       ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f')) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a) ⊠' (id a')) (f ⊠' f')) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! id_right
          ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (maponpaths
        (compose
           ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
        (! functor_id T (b,, b'))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
        (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a')))
     (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
        (! functor_id T (a,, a')))
     (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; id_disp
                            (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a'))) ;; 
   ♯ TT
     (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
      ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f')) = ?b
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a')))
  (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_id T (a,, a')))
  (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; id_disp
                         (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a'))) ;; 
♯ TT
  (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
   ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f') = ?t2

            apply mor_disp_transportf_postwhisker.
          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (! assoc (id T (a,, a'))
       ((# T)%cat ((id a) ⊠' (id a')))
       ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f')) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a) ⊠' (id a')) (f ⊠' f')) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! id_right
          ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (maponpaths
        (compose
           ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
        (! functor_id T (b,, b'))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
        (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (id T (a,, a') · id T (a,, a'))
        (id T (a,, a') · (# T)%cat ((id a) ⊠' (id a')))
        ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f'))
        (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
           (! functor_id T (a,, a'))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; id_disp
                            (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a')) ;; 
      ♯ TT
        (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
         ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @
   ! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @ ?p)
  (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                    ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (! assoc (id T (a,, a'))
       ((# T)%cat ((id a) ⊠' (id a')))
       ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f')) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a) ⊠' (id a')) (f ⊠' f')) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! id_right
          ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (maponpaths
        (compose
           ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
        (! functor_id T (b,, b'))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
        (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (id T (a,, a') · id T (a,, a'))
        (id T (a,, a') · (# T)%cat ((id a) ⊠' (id a')))
        ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f'))
        (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
           (! functor_id T (a,, a'))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; id_disp
                            (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a')) ;; 
      ♯ TT
        (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
         ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))) = ?b
