D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
?b =
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @
   ! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @ ?p)
  (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                    ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (! assoc (id T (a,, a'))
       ((# T)%cat ((id a) ⊠' (id a')))
       ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f')) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a) ⊠' (id a')) (f ⊠' f')) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! id_right
          ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (maponpaths
        (compose
           ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
        (! functor_id T (b,, b'))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
        (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
     (cancel_postcomposition
        (id T (a,, a') · id T (a,, a'))
        (id T (a,, a') · (# T)%cat ((id a) ⊠' (id a')))
        ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f'))
        (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
           (! functor_id T (a,, a'))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; id_disp
                            (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a')) ;; 
      ♯ TT
        (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
         ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))) = ?b
 apply transport_f_f.
          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (id T (a,, a') · id T (a,, a'))
     (id T (a,, a') · (# T)%cat ((id a) ⊠' (id a')))
     ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f'))
     (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
        (! functor_id T (a,, a'))) @
   ! assoc (id T (a,, a'))
       ((# T)%cat ((id a) ⊠' (id a')))
       ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f')) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a) ⊠' (id a')) (f ⊠' f')) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! id_right
          ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (maponpaths
        (compose
           ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
        (! functor_id T (b,, b'))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; id_disp
                         (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a')) ;; 
   ♯ TT
     (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
      ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f')) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @
   ! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @ ?p)
  (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                    ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (id T (a,, a') · id T (a,, a'))
     (id T (a,, a') · (# T)%cat ((id a) ⊠' (id a')))
     ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f'))
     (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
        (! functor_id T (a,, a'))) @
   ! assoc (id T (a,, a'))
       ((# T)%cat ((id a) ⊠' (id a')))
       ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f')) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a) ⊠' (id a')) (f ⊠' f')) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! id_right
          ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (maponpaths
        (compose
           ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
        (! functor_id T (b,, b'))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; id_disp
                         (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a')) ;; 
   ♯ TT
     (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
      ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f')) = ?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
?b =
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @
   ! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @ ?p)
  (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                    ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C

S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (id T (a,, a') · id T (a,, a'))
     (id T (a,, a') · (# T)%cat ((id a) ⊠' (id a')))
     ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f'))
     (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
        (! functor_id T (a,, a'))) @
   ! assoc (id T (a,, a'))
       ((# T)%cat ((id a) ⊠' (id a')))
       ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f')) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a) ⊠' (id a')) (f ⊠' f')) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! id_right
          ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (maponpaths
        (compose
           ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
        (! functor_id T (b,, b'))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; id_disp
                         (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a')) ;; 
   ♯ TT
     (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
      ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f')) = ?b

a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; id_disp (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a')) ;; 
♯ TT
  (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
   ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f') = ?t2

            
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C

S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =

  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; id_disp (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a')) =
?y'

            apply id_right_disp.
          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (id T (a,, a') · id T (a,, a'))
     (id T (a,, a') · (# T)%cat ((id a) ⊠' (id a')))
     ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f'))
     (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
        (! functor_id T (a,, a'))) @
   ! assoc (id T (a,, a'))
       ((# T)%cat ((id a) ⊠' (id a')))
       ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f')) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a) ⊠' (id a')) (f ⊠' f')) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! id_right
          ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (maponpaths
        (compose
           ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
        (! functor_id T (b,, b'))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
        (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a')))
     (id_right (id T (a,, a'))) (pr1 (pr1 α a a')) ;; 
   ♯ TT
     (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
      ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f')) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @
   ! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @ ?p)
  (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                    ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))

S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (id T (a,, a') · id T (a,, a'))
     (id T (a,, a') · (# T)%cat ((id a) ⊠' (id a')))
     ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f'))
     (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
        (! functor_id T (a,, a'))) @
   ! assoc (id T (a,, a'))
       ((# T)%cat ((id a) ⊠' (id a')))
       ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f')) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a) ⊠' (id a')) (f ⊠' f')) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! id_right
          ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (maponpaths
        (compose
           ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
        (! functor_id T (b,, b'))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (transportb
     (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
        (TT (a,, a') (S a,, S a')))
     (id_right (id T (a,, a'))) (pr1 (pr1 α a a')) ;; 
   ♯ TT
     (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
      ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f')) = ?b

(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (id T (a,, a') · id T (a,, a'))
     (id T (a,, a') · (# T)%cat ((id a) ⊠' (id a')))
     ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f'))
     (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
        (! functor_id T (a,, a'))) @
   ! assoc (id T (a,, a'))
       ((# T)%cat ((id a) ⊠' (id a')))
       ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f')) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a) ⊠' (id a')) (f ⊠' f')) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! id_right
          ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (maponpaths
        (compose
           ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
        (! functor_id T (b,, b'))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))

  (transportf

        (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
     (cancel_postcomposition (id T (a,, a'))
        (id T (a,, a') · id T (a,, a'))
        ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f'))
        (! id_right (id T (a,, a'))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; ♯ TT
                            (section_disp_on_morphisms
                               S f
                             ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms
                                   S f'))) =

  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @
   ! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @ ?p)
  (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                    ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (id T (a,, a') · id T (a,, a'))
     (id T (a,, a') · (# T)%cat ((id a) ⊠' (id a')))
     ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f'))
     (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
        (! functor_id T (a,, a'))) @
   ! assoc (id T (a,, a'))
       ((# T)%cat ((id a) ⊠' (id a')))
       ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f')) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a) ⊠' (id a')) (f ⊠' f')) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! id_right
          ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (maponpaths
        (compose
           ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
        (! functor_id T (b,, b'))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
        (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
     (cancel_postcomposition (id T (a,, a'))
        (id T (a,, a') · id T (a,, a'))
        ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f'))
        (! id_right (id T (a,, a'))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; ♯ TT
                            (section_disp_on_morphisms
                               S f
                             ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms
                                   S f'))) = ?b
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
?b =
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @
   ! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @ ?p)
  (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                    ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (cancel_postcomposition
     (id T (a,, a') · id T (a,, a'))
     (id T (a,, a') · (# T)%cat ((id a) ⊠' (id a')))
     ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f'))
     (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
        (! functor_id T (a,, a'))) @
   ! assoc (id T (a,, a'))
       ((# T)%cat ((id a) ⊠' (id a')))
       ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f')) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a) ⊠' (id a')) (f ⊠' f')) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! id_right
          ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (maponpaths
        (compose
           ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
        (! functor_id T (b,, b'))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (transportf
     (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
        (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
     (cancel_postcomposition (id T (a,, a'))
        (id T (a,, a') · id T (a,, a'))
        ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f'))
        (! id_right (id T (a,, a'))))
     (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; ♯ TT
                            (section_disp_on_morphisms
                               S f
                             ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms
                                   S f'))) = ?b
 apply transport_f_f. 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (cancel_postcomposition (id T (a,, a'))
     (id T (a,, a') · id T (a,, a'))
     ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f'))
     (! id_right (id T (a,, a'))) @
   cancel_postcomposition
     (id T (a,, a') · id T (a,, a'))
     (id T (a,, a') · (# T)%cat ((id a) ⊠' (id a')))
     ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f'))
     (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
        (! functor_id T (a,, a'))) @
   ! assoc (id T (a,, a'))
       ((# T)%cat ((id a) ⊠' (id a')))
       ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f')) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a) ⊠' (id a')) (f ⊠' f')) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! id_right
          ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (maponpaths
        (compose
           ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
        (! functor_id T (b,, b'))) @
   maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
          ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))))
  (pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; ♯ TT
                         (section_disp_on_morphisms S
                            f
                          ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms
                                S f')) =
transportf
  (mor_disp (S (T (a,, a')))
     (TT (b,, b') (S b,, S b')))
  (id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @
   ! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @ ?p)
  (pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                   (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                    ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f'))

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
cancel_postcomposition (id T (a,, a'))
  (id T (a,, a') · id T (a,, a'))
  ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f')) (! id_right (id T (a,, a'))) @
cancel_postcomposition (id T (a,, a') · id T (a,, a'))
  (id T (a,, a') · (# T)%cat ((id a) ⊠' (id a')))
  ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f'))
  (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_id T (a,, a'))) @
! assoc (id T (a,, a'))
    ((# T)%cat ((id a) ⊠' (id a')))
    ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f')) @
maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
  (! functor_comp T ((id a) ⊠' (id a')) (f ⊠' f')) @
maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
  (! id_right ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')))) @
maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
  (maponpaths
     (compose ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
     (! functor_id T (b,, b'))) @
maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
  (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
       ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))) =
id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @
! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @ ?p
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; ♯ TT
                      (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                       ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S
                             f') =
pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                 ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f')

          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
cancel_postcomposition (id T (a,, a'))
  (id T (a,, a') · id T (a,, a'))
  ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f')) (! id_right (id T (a,, a'))) @
cancel_postcomposition (id T (a,, a') · id T (a,, a'))
  (id T (a,, a') · (# T)%cat ((id a) ⊠' (id a')))
  ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f'))
  (maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
     (! functor_id T (a,, a'))) @
! assoc (id T (a,, a'))
    ((# T)%cat ((id a) ⊠' (id a')))
    ((# T)%cat (f ⊠' f')) @
maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
  (! functor_comp T ((id a) ⊠' (id a')) (f ⊠' f')) @
maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
  (! id_right ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f')))) @
maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
  (maponpaths
     (compose ((# T)%cat ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))))
     (! functor_id T (b,, b'))) @
maponpaths (compose (id T (a,, a')))
  (! functor_comp T ((id a · f) ⊠' (id a' · f'))
       ((id b) ⊠' (id b'))) =
id_left ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @
! id_right ((# T)%cat (f,, f')) @ ?p
 apply C.
          
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: precategory_binproduct_data C C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a, a', b, b': C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
f': C ⟦ a', b' ⟧
X:= @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT: ∏ (x y z : C ⊠ C) (xx : (D ⊠⊠ D) x)
(yy : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) y) (zz : pr1 (D ⊠⊠ D) z)
(f : C ⊠ C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⊠ C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(ff : xx -->[ f] yy) (gg : yy -->[ g] zz),
♯ TT (ff ;; gg) =
transportb (mor_disp (TT x xx) (TT z zz))
  (functor_comp T f g) (♯ TT ff ;; ♯ TT gg)
pr1 (pr1 α a a') ;; ♯ TT
                      (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                       ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S
                             f') =
pr1 α a a' ;; ♯ TT
                (section_disp_on_morphisms S f
                 ⊠⊠' section_disp_on_morphisms S f')
 apply idpath.
    
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
is_nat_iso
  (make_nat_trans (T ∙ section_functor S)
     (section_functor_pair ∙ total_tensor T TT)
     ((λ a : C ⊠ C,
       identity_iso (T a),,
       ((let X := pr1 α in
         let X0 := λ c c' : C, pr1 (X c c') in
         X0 (pr1 a) (pr2 a))
        :
        (λ f : C ⟦ T a,
               T (make_dirprod (pr1 a) (pr2 a)) ⟧,
         S (T a) -->[
         f] TT (make_dirprod (pr1 a) (pr2 a))
              (make_dirprod (S (pr1 a)) (S (pr2 a))))
          (identity_iso (T a)))
       :
       total_category D ⟦ (T ∙ section_functor S) a,
       (section_functor_pair ∙ total_tensor T TT) a ⟧)
      :
      nat_trans_data (T ∙ section_functor S)
        (section_functor_pair ∙ total_tensor T TT))
     (((λ x : precategory_binproduct_data C C,
        (λ (a a' : C)
         (x' : precategory_binproduct_data C C),
         (λ (b b' : C)
          (f0 : precategory_binproduct_data C C
                ⟦ a,, a', b,, b' ⟧),
          (λ (f : C ⟦ pr1 (a,, a'), pr1 (b,, b') ⟧)
           (f' : C ⟦ pr2 (a,, a'), pr2 (b,, b') ⟧),
           total2_paths_f ?p
             (maponpaths (transportf (...) ?p)
                (monoidal_tensor_ax' α a a' b b' f f') @
              transport_f_f (mor_disp ... ...)
                (! id_right ...) ?p
                (transportf ... ... ...) @
              transport_f_f (...) (...) (...)
                (... ;; ...) @ ! (... ...)
              :
              transportf (mor_disp (...) (...)) ?p
                (pr2 (...)) =
              pr2 (id ... · ...,, pr1 ... ;; ♯ TT ...))
           :
           (# (functor_composite_data T
                 (section_functor_data S)))%cat
             (f,, f')
           · (id T (b,, b'),, pr1 (pr1 α (...) (...))) =
           (id T (a,, a'),, pr1 (pr1 α (...) (...)))
           · (# (functor_composite_data
                   (pair_functor_data ... ...)
                   (functor_composite_data ... ...)))%cat
               (f,, f')) (pr1 f0) (pr2 f0)) (pr1 x')
           (pr2 x')) (pr1 x) (pr2 x))
       :
       is_nat_trans
         (functor_composite_data T
            (section_functor_data S))
         (functor_composite_data
            (pair_functor_data (section_functor S)
               (section_functor S))
            (functor_composite_data
               (invmap
                  (catiso_ob_weq (catiso_reord D D)),,
                (λ (X
                    Y : (∑ x : C, D x)
                        × (∑ x : C, D x))
                 (f : precategory_binproduct_mor
                        (total_category_ob_mor D)
                        (total_category_ob_mor D) X Y),
                 reord1_hom_inverse D D
                   (reord1_ob_inverse D D X)
                   (reord1_ob_inverse D D Y)
                   (make_dirprod
                      (id pr11 X · pr11 f · id pr11 Y,,
                       id_disp (pr21 X) ;; pr21 f ;; 
                       id_disp (pr21 Y))
                      (id pr12 X · pr12 f · id pr12 Y,,
                       id_disp (pr22 X) ;; pr22 f ;; 
                       id_disp (pr22 Y)))))
               (total_functor_data TT)))
         (λ a : C × C,
          id T a,, pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 a) (pr2 a))))
      :
      is_nat_trans (T ∙ section_functor S)
        (section_functor_pair ∙ total_tensor T TT)
        ((λ a : C ⊠ C,
          identity_iso (T a),,
          ((let X := pr1 α in
            let X0 := λ c c' : C, pr1 (X c c') in
            X0 (pr1 a) (pr2 a))
           :
           (λ f : C ⟦ T a,
                  T (make_dirprod (pr1 a) (pr2 a)) ⟧,
            S (T a) -->[
            f] TT (make_dirprod (pr1 a) (pr2 a))
                 (make_dirprod (S (pr1 a)) (S (pr2 a))))
             (identity_iso (T a)))
          :
          total_category D
          ⟦ (T ∙ section_functor S) a,
          (section_functor_pair ∙ total_tensor T TT) a
          ⟧)
         :
         nat_trans_data (T ∙ section_functor S)
           (section_functor_pair ∙ total_tensor T TT))))
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a: C ⊠ C
b: total_category D
f: total_category D ⟦ (T ∙ section_functor S) a, b ⟧
iscontr
  (hfiber
     (precomp_with
        (make_nat_trans (T ∙ section_functor S)
           (section_functor_pair ∙ total_tensor T TT)
           (λ a : C ⊠ C,
            identity_iso (T a),,
            (let X := pr1 α in
             let X0 := λ c c' : C, pr1 (X c c') in
             X0 (pr1 a) (pr2 a)))
           (λ (x x' : precategory_binproduct_data C C)
            (f0 : precategory_binproduct_data C C
                  ⟦ pr1 x,, pr2 x, pr1 x',, pr2 x' ⟧),
            total2_paths_f
              ?p@{a:=pr1 x; a':=pr2 x; b:=pr1 x';
                  b':=pr2 x'; f:=pr1 f0; f':=pr2 f0}
              (maponpaths
                 (transportf
                    (mor_disp (S (T (pr1 x,, pr2 x)))
                       (TT
                          (make_dirprod (pr1 x')
                             (pr2 x'))
                          (make_dirprod (S (pr1 x'))
                             (S (pr2 x')))))
                    ?p@{a:=pr1 x; a':=pr2 x;
                        b:=pr1 x'; b':=pr2 x';
                        f:=pr1 f0; f':=pr2 f0})
                 (monoidal_tensor_ax' α (pr1 x)
                    (pr2 x) (pr1 x') (pr2 x') (pr1 f0)
                    (pr2 f0)) @
               transport_f_f
                 (mor_disp (S (T (pr1 x,, pr2 x)))
                    (TT (pr1 x',, pr2 x')
                       (S (pr1 x'),, S (pr2 x'))))
                 (! id_right
                      ((# T)%cat (pr1 f0,, pr2 f0)))
                 ?p@{a:=pr1 x; a':=pr2 x; b:=pr1 x';
                     b':=pr2 x'; f:=pr1 f0; f':=pr2 f0}
                 (transportf
                    (mor_disp (S (T (pr1 x,, pr2 x)))
                       (TT (pr1 x',, pr2 x')
                          (S (pr1 x'),, S (pr2 x'))))
                    (id_left
                       ((# T)%cat (pr1 f0,, pr2 f0)))
                    (pr1 α (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; ♯ TT
                                                (section_disp_on_morphisms
                                                 S
                                                 (pr1
                                                 f0)
                                                 ⊠⊠' 
                                                 section_disp_on_morphisms
                                                 S
                                                 (pr2
                                                 f0)))) @
               transport_f_f
                 (mor_disp (S (T (pr1 x,, pr2 x)))
                    (TT (pr1 x',, pr2 x')
                       (S (pr1 x'),, S (pr2 x'))))
                 (id_left
                    ((# T)%cat (pr1 f0,, pr2 f0)))
                 (! id_right
                      ((# T)%cat (pr1 f0,, pr2 f0)) @
                  ?p@{a:=pr1 x; a':=pr2 x; b:=pr1 x';
                      b':=pr2 x'; f:=pr1 f0;
                      f':=pr2 f0})
                 (pr1 α (pr1 x) (pr2 x) ;; ♯ TT
                                             (section_disp_on_morphisms
                                                S
                                                (pr1
                                                 f0)
                                              ⊠⊠' 
                                              section_disp_on_morphisms
                                                S
                                                (pr2
                                                 f0))) @
               ! (let X :=
                    @disp_functor_comp (C ⊠ C) C T
                      (D ⊠⊠ D) D TT in
                  maponpaths
                    (comp_disp
                       (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 x) (pr2 x))))
                    (let X' :=
                       X (pr1 x,, pr2 x)
                         (pr1 x',, pr2 x')
                         (pr1 x',, pr2 x')
                         (S (pr1 x),, S (pr2 x))
                         (S (pr1 x'),, S (pr2 x'))
                         (S (pr1 x'),, S (pr2 x')) in
                     let X'' :=
                       X'
                         ((id ... · ...)
                          ⊠' (id ... · ...))
                         ((id pr1 x') ⊠' (id pr2 x'))
                       in
                     let X3 :=
                       X''
                         ((... ;; ...)
                          ⊠⊠' (... ;; ...)) in
                     let X4 := X3 (... ⊠⊠' ...) in X4) @
                  mor_disp_transportf_prewhisker
                    (! functor_comp T
                         ((id pr1 x · pr1 f0)
                          ⊠' (id pr2 x · pr2 f0))
                         ((id pr1 x') ⊠' (id pr2 x')))
                    (pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 x) (pr2 x)))
                    (♯ TT
                       ((id_disp (S ...) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                              S
                                              (pr1 f0))
                        ⊠⊠' (id_disp (S ...) ;; section_disp_on_morphisms
                                                 S
                                                 (pr2
                                                 f0))) ;; 
                     ♯ TT
                       (id_disp (S (...))
                        ⊠⊠' id_disp (S (...)))) @
                  maponpaths
                    (transportf
                       (mor_disp (S (...))
                          (TT (...) (...)))
                       (maponpaths (compose (id ...))
                          (! functor_comp T (...)
                               (...))))
                    (maponpaths
                       (comp_disp (pr1 (...)))
                       (maponpaths (comp_disp ...)
                          (... ...) @
                        mor_disp_transportf_prewhisker
                          (! functor_id T ...)
                          (♯ TT ...) (id_disp ...))) @
                  maponpaths
                    (transportf
                       (mor_disp (S ...) (TT ... ...))
                       (maponpaths (compose ...)
                          (! functor_comp T ... ...)))
                    (mor_disp_transportf_prewhisker
                       (maponpaths (compose ...)
                          (! functor_id T ...))
                       (pr1 (pr1 α ... ...))
                       (♯ TT (... ⊠⊠' ...) ;; id_disp
                                                (TT
                                                 ...
                                                 ...))) @
                  maponpaths
                    (transportf (mor_disp (...) (...))
                       (maponpaths (...) (! ...)))
                    (maponpaths
                       (transportf (...) (...))
                       (maponpaths (...) (...))) @
                  maponpaths
                    (transportf (mor_disp ... ...)
                       (maponpaths ... ...))
                    (maponpaths (transportf ... ...)
                       (mor_disp_transportf_prewhisker
                          ... ... ...)) @
                  transport_f_f (mor_disp (...) (...))
                    (maponpaths (...) (...))
                    (maponpaths (...) (! ...))
                    (transportf (...) (...)
                       (... ;; ...)) @
                  transport_f_f (mor_disp ... ...)
                    (maponpaths ... ...) (... @ ...)
                    (pr1 ... ;; ♯ TT ...) @
                  maponpaths (...) (...) @
                  maponpaths ... ... @ ... @ ...))) a))
     f)
 
C: category
D: disp_cat C
T: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
TT: displayed_tensor T D
S: section_disp D
α: monoidal_tensor_section
a: C ⊠ C
b: total_category D
f: total_category D ⟦ (T ∙ section_functor S) a, b ⟧
iscontr
  (hfiber
     (precomp_with
        (id T a,, pr1 (pr1 α (pr1 a) (pr2 a)))) f)

      admit.
  Abort.

End section_tensor.


Section FixDispTensor.

  Context {C : category}
          (tensor : C ⊠ C ⟶ C)
          {D : disp_cat C}
          (disp_tensor : displayed_tensor tensor D).

  Let al : functor _ _ := assoc_left tensor.
  Let ar : functor _ _ := assoc_right tensor.

  
C: category
tensor: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
disp_tensor: displayed_tensor tensor D
al:= assoc_left tensor: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟶ C
ar:= assoc_right tensor: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟶ C
disp_functor al ((D ⊠⊠ D) ⊠⊠ D) D

  
C: category
tensor: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
disp_tensor: displayed_tensor tensor D
al:= assoc_left tensor: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟶ C
ar:= assoc_right tensor: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟶ C
disp_functor al ((D ⊠⊠ D) ⊠⊠ D) D

    
C: category
tensor: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
disp_tensor: displayed_tensor tensor D
al:= assoc_left tensor: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟶ C
ar:= assoc_right tensor: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟶ C
disp_cat (C ⊠ C)
C: category
tensor: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
disp_tensor: displayed_tensor tensor D
al:= assoc_left tensor: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟶ C
ar:= assoc_right tensor: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟶ C
disp_functor
  (pair_functor tensor (functor_identity C))
  ((D ⊠⊠ D) ⊠⊠ D) ?D'
C: category
tensor: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
disp_tensor: displayed_tensor tensor D
al:= assoc_left tensor: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟶ C
ar:= assoc_right tensor: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟶ C
disp_functor tensor ?D' D

    
C: category
tensor: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
disp_tensor: displayed_tensor tensor D
al:= assoc_left tensor: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟶ C
ar:= assoc_right tensor: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟶ C
disp_cat (C ⊠ C)
 use (disp_binprod D D).
    
C: category
tensor: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
disp_tensor: displayed_tensor tensor D
al:= assoc_left tensor: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟶ C
ar:= assoc_right tensor: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟶ C
disp_functor
  (pair_functor tensor (functor_identity C))
  ((D ⊠⊠ D) ⊠⊠ D) (D ⊠⊠ D)
 
C: category
tensor: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
disp_tensor: displayed_tensor tensor D
al:= assoc_left tensor: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟶ C
ar:= assoc_right tensor: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟶ C
disp_functor tensor (D ⊠⊠ D) D
C: category
tensor: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
disp_tensor: displayed_tensor tensor D
al:= assoc_left tensor: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟶ C
ar:= assoc_right tensor: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟶ C
disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D

      
C: category
tensor: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
disp_tensor: displayed_tensor tensor D
al:= assoc_left tensor: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟶ C
ar:= assoc_right tensor: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟶ C
disp_functor tensor (D ⊠⊠ D) D
 use disp_tensor.
      
C: category
tensor: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
disp_tensor: displayed_tensor tensor D
al:= assoc_left tensor: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟶ C
ar:= assoc_right tensor: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟶ C
disp_functor (functor_identity C) D D
 use disp_functor_identity.
    
C: category
tensor: C ⊠ C ⟶ C
D: disp_cat C
disp_tensor: displayed_tensor tensor D
al:= assoc_left tensor: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟶ C
ar:= assoc_right tensor: (C ⊠ C) ⊠ C ⟶ C
disp_functor tensor (D ⊠⊠ D) D
 use disp_tensor.
  Defined.



  (* TODO
  Definition disp_assoc_right : @disp_functor (C ⊠ (C ⊠ C)) C ar  (D ⊠⊠ (D ⊠⊠ D)) D .
  Proof.
    use disp_functor_composite.
    - use (disp_binprod D D).
    - use disp_pair_functor.
      + use disp_tensor.
      + use disp_functor_identity.
    - use disp_tensor.
  Defined.
*)


End FixDispTensor.
